    NULL AS TransactionID, 
    g.GasStationID, 
    p.ProductID, 
    NULL AS Date, 
    0 AS Amount, 
    COALESCE(g.ChainID, 0) AS ChainID, 
    COALESCE(p.Description, '') AS Description
FROM gasstations g
LEFT JOIN products p ON g.GasStationID = p.ProductID
WHERE g.GasStationID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT GasStationID FROM transactions_1k WHERE GasStationID IS NOT NULL)

UNION

SELECT 
    NULL AS TransactionID, 
    t1.GasStationID, 
    p.ProductID, 
    NULL AS Date, 
    0 AS Amount, 
    0 AS ChainID, 
    COALESCE(p.Description, '') AS Description
FROM products p

WHERE p.ProductID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ProductID FROM transactions_1k WHERE ProductID IS NOT NULL)

SELECT 
    rating AS RATES,
    SUM(CASE WHEN attr = 'A8' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS A8,
    SUM(CASE WHEN attr = 'A9' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS A9
FROM (
    SELECT 'A8' AS attr, A8 AS rating, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM district
    WHERE A8 IN (0,1,2,3,4,5)
    GROUP BY A8
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 'A9' AS attr, A9 AS rating, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM district
    WHERE A9 IN (0,1,2,3,4,5)
    GROUP BY A9
) AS counts
GROUP BY rating
ORDER BY rating DESC

SELECT
  Id,
  DisplayName,
  Age,
  CASE 
    WHEN CreationDate IS NULL OR LastAccessDate IS NULL THEN 0
    ELSE (
      SELECT COUNT(*) 
      FROM (
        SELECT DATE_ADD(CreationDate, INTERVAL seq.n DAY) as active_date
        FROM (
          SELECT a.N + b.N * 10 + c.N * 100 + d.N * 1000 as n
          FROM 
            (SELECT 0 as N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) a,
            (SELECT 0 as N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) b,
            (SELECT 0 as N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) c,
            (SELECT 0 as N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4) d
        ) seq
        WHERE DATE_ADD(CreationDate, INTERVAL seq.n DAY) <= LastAccessDate
          AND DATE_ADD(CreationDate, INTERVAL seq.n DAY) >= CreationDate
          AND DATE_ADD(CreationDate, INTERVAL seq.n DAY) BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2014-12-31'
      ) dates
      WHERE DAYOFWEEK(dates.active_date) NOT IN (1, 7) -- Exclude Sunday (1) and Saturday (7)
        AND NOT (
          (MONTH(dates.active_date) = 1 AND DAY(dates.active_date) = 1) OR -- New Year's Day
          (MONTH(dates.active_date) = 7 AND DAY(dates.active_date) = 4) OR -- Independence Day
          (MONTH(dates.active_date) = 11 AND DAY(dates.active_date) = 11) OR -- Veterans Day
          (MONTH(dates.active_date) = 12 AND DAY(dates.active_date) = 25) -- Christmas Day
        )
    )
  END AS TotalDays
FROM users
ORDER BY Id

SELECT 
    t1.CustomerID as Customer1, 
    t2.CustomerID as Customer2, 
    COUNT(*) as Count 
FROM transactions_1k t1
INNER JOIN transactions_1k t2 
    ON t1.Date = t2.Date 
    AND t1.GasStationID = t2.GasStationID 
    AND t1.CustomerID < t2.CustomerID
GROUP BY t1.CustomerID, t2.CustomerID
ORDER BY Count DESC

WITH DAILY_REVENUE AS (
    SELECT Date, SUM(Amount) AS TotalAmount 
    FROM transactions_1k 
    GROUP BY Date
), 
MOVING_STATS AS (
    SELECT 
        Date,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(*) OVER(ORDER BY Date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) = 3 
            THEN SUM(TotalAmount) OVER(ORDER BY Date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS MovingSum,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(*) OVER(ORDER BY Date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) = 3 
            THEN CAST(AVG(TotalAmount) OVER(ORDER BY Date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS DECIMAL(10,2))
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS MovingAverage
    FROM DAILY_REVENUE
)
SELECT Date, MovingSum, MovingAverage
FROM MOVING_STATS
ORDER BY Date ASC

SELECT 
    s1.id,
    s1.code,
    CASE 
        WHEN s3.code IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(s1.code, '-', s2.code, '-', s3.code)
        WHEN s2.code IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(s1.code, '-', s2.code)
        ELSE s1.code
    END AS ancestralCode
FROM sets s1
LEFT JOIN sets s2 ON s1.parentCode = s2.code
LEFT JOIN sets s3 ON s2.parentCode = s3.code
ORDER BY s1.code

SELECT 
    e.event_id AS event_id,
    e.event_name AS event_name,
    (SELECT MAX(a.link_to_member)
     FROM attendance a
     WHERE a.link_to_event = e.event_id) AS largest_attendance_member,
    (SELECT MAX(ex.link_to_member)
     FROM expense ex
     JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
     WHERE b.link_to_event = e.event_id) AS largest_expense_member,
    (SELECT AVG(ex2.cost)
     FROM expense ex2
     JOIN budget b2 ON ex2.link_to_budget = b2.budget_id
     WHERE b2.link_to_event = e.event_id 
     AND ex2.link_to_member = (
         SELECT MAX(ex3.link_to_member)
         FROM expense ex3
         JOIN budget b3 ON ex3.link_to_budget = b3.budget_id
         WHERE b3.link_to_event = e.event_id
     )) AS avg_expense_cost,
    (SELECT MAX(i.link_to_member)
     FROM income i
     WHERE i.link_to_member IN (
         SELECT a2.link_to_member
         FROM attendance a2
         WHERE a2.link_to_event = e.event_id
     )) AS largest_income_member,
    (SELECT AVG(i2.amount)
     FROM income i2
     WHERE i2.link_to_member IN (
         SELECT a3.link_to_member
         FROM attendance a3
         WHERE a3.link_to_event = e.event_id
     )
     AND i2.link_to_member = (
         SELECT MAX(i3.link_to_member)
         FROM income i3
         WHERE i3.link_to_member IN (
             SELECT a4.link_to_member
             FROM attendance a4
             WHERE a4.link_to_event = e.event_id
         )
     )) AS avg_income_amount
FROM event e
WHERE e.event_id = 'recI43CzsZ0Q625ma'

WITH FirstTransactions AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        MIN(Date) AS FirstTransactionDate
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE CustomerID IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY CustomerID
),
AllTransactions AS (
    SELECT 
        t.*,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY Date, TransactionID) AS TransactionOrder
    FROM transactions_1k t
    WHERE CustomerID IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    a.*,
    CASE 
        WHEN a.TransactionOrder = 1 THEN 0
        ELSE DATEDIFF(a.Date, f.FirstTransactionDate)
    END AS Days_between
FROM AllTransactions a
JOIN FirstTransactions f ON a.CustomerID = f.CustomerID
ORDER BY a.CustomerID, a.Date, a.TransactionID

WITH max_cost AS (
    SELECT MAX(cost) as highest_cost
    FROM expense
),
department_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        m.department,
        COUNT(e.expense_id) as expense_count
    FROM expense e
    INNER JOIN member mem ON e.link_to_member = mem.member_id
    INNER JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
    CROSS JOIN max_cost mc
    WHERE e.cost = mc.highest_cost
    GROUP BY m.department
)

FROM department_counts
WHERE expense_count = (SELECT MAX(expense_count) FROM department_counts)

-- Step 1: Add the column
ALTER TABLE transactions_1k ADD COLUMN MA100 DECIMAL(10,2);

-- Step 2: Update with calculated values
UPDATE transactions_1k t1
SET MA100 = (
    SELECT CAST(AVG(t2.Amount) AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    FROM transactions_1k t2
    WHERE t2.CustomerID = t1.CustomerID
      AND (
          t2.Date < t1.Date 
          OR (t2.Date = t1.Date AND t2.Time <= t1.Time)
      )
    ORDER BY t2.Date DESC, t2.Time DESC
    LIMIT 100
)

SELECT 
    link_to_event,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Closed'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Open'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Open'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Planning'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS event_status,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 
            MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN remaining ELSE NULL END)
        ELSE 
            SUM(spent)
    END AS remaining_fund
FROM budget 
WHERE link_to_event IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY link_to_event

    FROM Match 
    WHERE league_id = 1
),
date_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        league_id,
        season,
        date,
        match_date,
        rn,
        DATE_SUB(match_date, INTERVAL rn DAY) as date_group
    FROM ordered_matches
)

    MAX(date) as end_date
FROM date_groups
GROUP BY league_id, season, date_group

WITH ChangeHistory AS (
    SELECT
        s.CDSCode,
        s.School,
        s.FundingType,
        s.LastUpdate,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.CDSCode ORDER BY s.LastUpdate) AS ChangeSequence
    FROM schools s
),
ChangesWithPrevious AS (
    SELECT
        ch.CDSCode,
        ch.School,
        ch.FundingType,
        ch.ChangeSequence,
        LAG(ch.School) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.CDSCode ORDER BY ch.ChangeSequence) AS PreviousSchool,
        LAG(ch.FundingType) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.CDSCode ORDER BY ch.ChangeSequence) AS PreviousFundingType
    FROM ChangeHistory ch
)
SELECT
    c.CDSCode,
    'School' AS ColumnName,
    ISNULL(c.PreviousSchool, '') AS OldValue,
    ISNULL(c.School, '') AS NewValue
FROM ChangesWithPrevious c
WHERE c.PreviousSchool IS NULL OR c.PreviousSchool <> c.School
UNION ALL
SELECT
    c.CDSCode,
    'FundingType' AS ColumnName,
    ISNULL(c.PreviousFundingType, '') AS OldValue,
    ISNULL(c.FundingType, '') AS NewValue
FROM ChangesWithPrevious c
WHERE c.PreviousFundingType IS NULL OR c.PreviousFundingType <> c.FundingType
ORDER BY
    CDSCode,
    CASE WHEN ColumnName = 'School' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END

MERGE account AS target
USING (VALUES 
    (4, 10, 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU', '2023-04-01'),
    (9999, 3, 'POPLATEK TYDNE', '2024-10-22')
) AS source (account_id, district_id, frequency, date)
ON target.account_id = source.account_id
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET 
        frequency = source.frequency,
        date = source.date
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (account_id, district_id, frequency, date)
    VALUES (source.account_id, source.district_id, source.frequency, source.date)

WITH TransactionWithPrevious AS (
    SELECT 
        trans_id,
        account_id,
        date,
        LAG(date) OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY date) AS prev_date
    FROM trans
)
SELECT 
    trans_id,
    account_id,
    date,
    CASE 
        WHEN prev_date IS NULL THEN 'New'  -- First transaction for the account
        WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, prev_date, date) <= 30 THEN 'Followup'  -- Within 30 days of previous
        ELSE 'New'  -- More than 30 days since previous transaction
    END AS Category
FROM TransactionWithPrevious

DECLARE @batch INT = 10000
WHILE @batch > 0
BEGIN
    BEGIN TRANSACTION
    
    INSERT INTO player_stats (player_id, match_id, goals, assists, yellow_cards, red_cards, minutes_played)
    SELECT TOP (@batch) 
        player_id, match_id, goals, assists, yellow_cards, red_cards, minutes_played
    FROM player_stats_temp pst
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM player_stats ps 
        WHERE ps.player_id = pst.player_id
    )
    
    SET @batch = @@ROWCOUNT
    
    COMMIT TRANSACTION
END

WITH ContractGroups AS (
    SELECT 
        DriverId,
        ContractType,
        StartDate,
        EndDate,
        -- Create a group identifier for consecutive/overlapping contracts
        DATEADD(day, 
            -ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DriverId, ContractType ORDER BY StartDate),
            StartDate
        ) AS GroupIdentifier
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            DriverId,
            ContractType,
            StartDate,
            EndDate,
            -- Check if current contract overlaps with previous one
            LAG(EndDate) OVER (PARTITION BY DriverId, ContractType ORDER BY StartDate) AS PrevEndDate
        FROM driverContracts
    ) AS OrderedContracts
    WHERE PrevEndDate IS NULL OR StartDate > DATEADD(day, 1, PrevEndDate)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Handle overlapping contracts
    SELECT 
        c1.DriverId,
        c1.ContractType,
        CASE WHEN c1.StartDate < c2.StartDate THEN c1.StartDate ELSE c2.StartDate END AS StartDate,
        CASE WHEN c1.EndDate > c2.EndDate THEN c1.EndDate ELSE c2.EndDate END AS EndDate,
        DATEADD(day, 
            -ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c1.DriverId, c1.ContractType ORDER BY c1.StartDate),
            CASE WHEN c1.StartDate < c2.StartDate THEN c1.StartDate ELSE c2.StartDate END
        ) AS GroupIdentifier
    FROM driverContracts c1
    INNER JOIN driverContracts c2 ON c1.DriverId = c2.DriverId 
        AND c1.ContractType = c2.ContractType
        AND c1.Id != c2.Id
        AND c1.StartDate <= DATEADD(day, 1, c2.EndDate)
        AND c2.StartDate <= DATEADD(day, 1, c1.EndDate)
),
GroupedContracts AS (
    SELECT 
        DriverId,
        ContractType,
        MIN(StartDate) AS StartDate,
        MAX(EndDate) AS EndDate
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            DriverId,
            ContractType,
            StartDate,
            EndDate,
            SUM(IsNewGroup) OVER (
                PARTITION BY DriverId, ContractType 
                ORDER BY StartDate 
                ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
            ) AS GroupNum
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                DriverId,
                ContractType,
                StartDate,
                EndDate,
                CASE 
                    WHEN LAG(EndDate) OVER (
                        PARTITION BY DriverId, ContractType 
                        ORDER BY StartDate
                    ) >= DATEADD(day, -1, StartDate) 
                    THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END AS IsNewGroup
            FROM driverContracts
        ) AS ContractsWithGroups
    ) AS NumberedGroups
    GROUP BY DriverId, ContractType, GroupNum
)
SELECT 
    DriverId,
    ContractType,
    StartDate,
    EndDate
FROM GroupedContracts
ORDER BY DriverId, ContractType, StartDate

WITH LabWithPreviousValues AS (
    SELECT 
        ID,
        Date,
        GOT,
        GPT,
        LAG(GOT, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY Date) as PrevGOT,
        LAG(GPT, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY Date) as PrevGPT,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY Date DESC) as rn
    FROM Laboratory
)
UPDATE l
SET 
    GOT = lwv.PrevGOT,
    GPT = lwv.PrevGPT
FROM Laboratory l
INNER JOIN LabWithPreviousValues lwv ON l.ID = lwv.ID AND l.Date = lwv.Date
WHERE lwv.rn = 1 
    AND lwv.PrevGOT IS NOT NULL 
    AND lwv.PrevGPT IS NOT NULL

DECLARE @STARTDATE NVARCHAR(100) = '1995-04-04'
DECLARE @ENDDATE NVARCHAR(100) = '1995-04-05'


CREATE TABLE #TransTypes (
    TransType NVARCHAR(50)
)


INSERT INTO #TransTypes
SELECT DISTINCT [type]
FROM trans
WHERE [date] BETWEEN CAST(@STARTDATE AS DATE) AND CAST(@ENDDATE AS DATE)


DECLARE @cols NVARCHAR(MAX) = STUFF(
(
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ', ' + QUOTENAME(TransType)
    FROM #TransTypes
    FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE
).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)')
, 1, 2, '')


IF @cols IS NULL OR @cols = ''
BEGIN
    PRINT 'No transaction types found in the specified date range.'
    DROP TABLE #TransTypes
    RETURN
END


DECLARE @sql NVARCHAR(MAX) =
N'
WITH DateRange AS (
    -- Generate all dates in the range to ensure all dates appear in output
    -- even if no transactions exist for that date
    SELECT CAST(''' + @STARTDATE + ''' AS DATE) + number AS FullDate
    FROM master.dbo.spt_values
    WHERE type = ''P'' 
    AND CAST(''' + @STARTDATE + ''' AS DATE) + number <= CAST(''' + @ENDDATE + ''' AS DATE)
)
SELECT dr.FullDate AS Date, ' +

STUFF((
    SELECT ', COALESCE(' + QUOTENAME(TransType) + ', 0) AS ' + QUOTENAME(TransType)
    FROM #TransTypes
    FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE
).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)'), 1, 2, '') +
N'
FROM DateRange dr
LEFT JOIN 
(
    SELECT 
        CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), [date], 120) AS Transaction_Date,
        [type],
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM trans
    WHERE [date] BETWEEN ''' + @STARTDATE + ''' AND ''' + @ENDDATE + '''
    GROUP BY CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), [date], 120), [type]
) s
PIVOT
(
    SUM(n)
    FOR [type] IN (' + @cols + ')
) pvt ON dr.FullDate = CAST(pvt.Transaction_Date AS DATE)
ORDER BY dr.FullDate;
'


DROP TABLE #TransTypes


EXEC sp_executesql @sql

IF @ID IS NULL
BEGIN
    -- Handle the null case, perhaps by raising an error
    RAISERROR('ID parameter cannot be null', 16, 1)
    RETURN
END

WITH cte AS (
    -- Anchor: Start with the given laboratory IDs
    SELECT ID, ParentID, ID as OriginalID
    FROM LaboratoryLink
    WHERE ID IN (657266, 115562)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive: Move up the hierarchy - if current record has a parent, find that parent
    SELECT t.ID, t.ParentID, c.OriginalID
    FROM LaboratoryLink t
    INNER JOIN cte c ON t.ID = c.ParentID
    WHERE c.ParentID IS NOT NULL
)

-- Select only the records where ParentID is NULL (top-level parents)
SELECT OriginalID as ID, ID as TopLevelParentID
FROM cte
WHERE ParentID IS NULL
ORDER BY OriginalID

DECLARE @info NVARCHAR(100) = '{"client_id":1,"gender":"F"}';

BEGIN TRY
    -- Check if the string is valid JSON
    IF (ISJSON(@info) > 0)
    BEGIN
        -- Check if gender field exists and is 'F'
        IF (JSON_VALUE(@info, '$.gender') = 'F')
        BEGIN
            -- Update gender from 'F' to 'M'
            SET @info = JSON_MODIFY(@info, '$.gender', 'M');
        END
        -- If gender doesn't exist or is not 'F', keep original JSON
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
        SET @info = '{"error": "Invalid JSON"}';
    END
END TRY
BEGIN CATCH
    SET @info = '{"error": "Invalid operation"}';
END CATCH

SELECT @info AS info

DECLARE @xml XML;

WITH SchemaInfo AS (
    SELECT
        COLUMN_NAME,
        DATA_TYPE,
        ORDINAL_POSITION
    FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
    WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'schools' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = SCHEMA_NAME()
),
SATData AS (
    SELECT
        cds,
        rtype,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY cds ORDER BY NumTstTakr DESC) AS RowRank
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumTstTakr > 0
)

SELECT @xml = (
    SELECT
        (SELECT
            COLUMN_NAME AS '@Name',
            DATA_TYPE AS 'DataType'
         FROM SchemaInfo
         ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION
         FOR XML PATH('Column'), TYPE) AS 'Columns',
        (SELECT
            cds,
            rtype
         FROM SATData
         WHERE RowRank = 1
         FOR XML PATH('Row'), TYPE) AS 'Rows'
    FOR XML PATH(''), ROOT('Results')
);

SELECT 
    CAST(@xml.query('/Results/Columns') AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS ColumnsXml,
    CAST(@xml.query('/Results/Rows') AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS RowsXml,
    CAST(@xml AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS EntireXmlAsText

WITH ZeroConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        Date,
        -- Convert YYYYMM format to proper date for calculation
        DATEFROMPARTS(LEFT(Date, 4), RIGHT(Date, 2), 1) AS MonthDate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY Date) AS rn
    FROM yearmonth 
    WHERE Consumption = 0
),
GroupedPeriods AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        Date,
        MonthDate,
        rn,
        -- Create group identifier: subtract row number from month sequence
        DATEADD(MONTH, -rn, MonthDate) AS GroupIdentifier
    FROM ZeroConsumption
)
SELECT 
    CustomerID,
    FORMAT(MIN(MonthDate), 'yyyy-MM') AS StartDate,
    FORMAT(MAX(MonthDate), 'yyyy-MM') AS EndDate

DECLARE @LabResults TABLE(
    ID INT,
    Date DATE,
    GOT INT,
    GPT INT,
    LDH INT
);

DECLARE @PatientInfo TABLE(
    ID INT,
    SEX NVARCHAR(10),
    Birthday DATE
);

INSERT INTO @LabResults
SELECT
    l.ID,
    l.Date,
    l.GOT,
    l.GPT,
    CASE
        WHEN l.LDH IS NULL THEN 
            (SELECT AVG(LDH) FROM Laboratory l2 
             WHERE l2.ID = l.ID 
             AND l2.Date BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, -3, l.Date) AND DATEADD(MONTH, 3, l.Date)
             AND l2.LDH IS NOT NULL)
        ELSE l.LDH
    END AS LDH
FROM Laboratory l
INNER JOIN Examination e ON l.ID = e.ID AND l.Date = e.[Examination Date]
WHERE e.Thrombosis = 1
    AND l.Date BETWEEN DATEADD(MONTH, -3, e.[Examination Date]) AND e.[Examination Date];

INSERT INTO @PatientInfo
SELECT
    p.ID,
    p.SEX,
    p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT ID FROM @LabResults)
    AND p.Birthday > '1950-01-01';

SELECT
    lr.ID,
    pi.SEX,
    DATEDIFF(YEAR, pi.Birthday, lr.Date) AS Age,
    lr.GOT,
    lr.GPT,
    lr.LDH,
    CAST(lr.GOT AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(lr.GPT, 0) AS Ratio
FROM @LabResults lr
LEFT JOIN @PatientInfo pi ON lr.ID = pi.ID
WHERE lr.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM @LabResults WHERE ID = lr.ID)
ORDER BY lr.Date

WITH 
-- Step 1: Merge overlapping blackout periods
merged_blackout AS (
    SELECT 
        MIN(start_date) AS blackout_start,
        MAX(end_date) AS blackout_end
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            start_date,
            end_date,
            SUM(CASE WHEN prev_end IS NULL OR prev_end < start_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
                OVER (ORDER BY start_date) AS grp
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                start_date,
                end_date,
                LAG(end_date) OVER (ORDER BY start_date) AS prev_end
            FROM blackout_periods
            WHERE start_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date IS NOT NULL
        ) t
    ) grouped
    GROUP BY grp
),
-- Step 2: Find gaps between merged blackout periods (inverse)
blackout_gaps AS (
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(DAY, 1, blackout_end) AS gap_start,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, LEAD(start_date) OVER (ORDER BY blackout_start)) AS gap_end
    FROM merged_blackout
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Add initial gap before first blackout
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(DAY, -10000, MIN(blackout_start)) AS gap_start,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, MIN(blackout_start)) AS gap_end
    FROM merged_blackout
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Add final gap after last blackout
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(DAY, 1, MAX(blackout_end)) AS gap_start,
        DATEADD(DAY, 10000, MAX(blackout_end)) AS gap_end
    FROM merged_blackout
),
-- Step 3: Get valid account activity periods
valid_activities AS (
    SELECT start_date, end_date
    FROM account_activity
    WHERE start_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date IS NOT NULL
)
-- Step 4: Find intersection of activity periods with non-blackout gaps
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN a.start_date > g.gap_start THEN a.start_date 
        ELSE g.gap_start 
    END AS start_date,
    CASE 
        WHEN a.end_date < g.gap_end THEN a.end_date 
        ELSE g.gap_end 
    END AS end_date
FROM valid_activities a
CROSS JOIN blackout_gaps g
WHERE a.start_date <= g.gap_end 
    AND a.end_date >= g.gap_start
    AND g.gap_start <= g.gap_end
ORDER BY start_date, end_date

WITH ClientAccountSummary AS (
    SELECT
        cl.client_id,
        cl.gender,
        cl.birth_date,
        d.account_id,
        d.type,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY cl.client_id ORDER BY d.account_id DESC) AS account_rank
    FROM client cl
    LEFT JOIN disp d ON d.client_id = cl.client_id AND d.type = 'OWNER'
),
BabyBoomerFlag AS (
    SELECT
        client_id,
        gender,
        CASE
            WHEN strftime('%Y', birth_date) BETWEEN '1948' AND '1960' THEN 'Yes'
            ELSE 'No'
        END as is_baby_boomer
    FROM client
)

    b.is_baby_boomer as age_old,
    CASE
        WHEN c.type = 'OWNER' THEN c.account_id
        ELSE NULL
    END as last_account
FROM ClientAccountSummary c
JOIN BabyBoomerFlag b ON b.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.account_rank = 1
ORDER BY c.client_id

WITH ExpSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        exp_id,
        mid,
        SUM(qty) as total_qty_needed
    FROM Experiment 
    WHERE mid = 2
    GROUP BY exp_id, mid
),
InventoryCheck AS (
    SELECT 
        e.exp_id,
        e.mid,
        e.total_qty_needed,
        i.qty as available_qty,
        CASE 
            WHEN i.qty >= e.total_qty_needed THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END as executable
    FROM ExpSummary e
    CROSS JOIN Inventory i 
    WHERE i.mid = 2
)
SELECT 
    exp_id,
    mid,
    executable
FROM InventoryCheck
ORDER BY exp_id

IF EXISTS(SELECT * FROM Information_schema.Routines WHERE Specific_schema = 'dbo' AND SPECIFIC_NAME = 'fnGetTeamAverageHeight' AND Routine_Type = 'FUNCTION')
    DROP FUNCTION [dbo].[fnGetTeamAverageHeight]
GO

CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fnGetTeamAverageHeight] (@team_api_id INT) 
RETURNS FLOAT 
AS
BEGIN 
    DECLARE @averageHeight FLOAT 
    
    ;WITH PlayerIds AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT home_player_1 as player_api_id FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_1 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT home_player_2 FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_2 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT home_player_3 FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_3 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT home_player_4 FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_4 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT home_player_5 FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_5 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT home_player_6 FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_6 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT home_player_7 FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_7 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT home_player_8 FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_8 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT home_player_9 FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_9 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT home_player_10 FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_10 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT home_player_11 FROM Match WHERE home_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND home_player_11 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_1 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_1 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_2 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_2 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_3 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_3 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_4 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_4 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_5 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_5 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_6 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_6 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_7 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_7 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_8 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_8 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_9 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_9 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_10 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_10 IS NOT NULL
        UNION SELECT DISTINCT away_player_11 FROM Match WHERE away_team_api_id = @team_api_id AND away_player_11 IS NOT NULL
    )
    SELECT @averageHeight = AVG(CAST(p.height AS FLOAT))
    FROM Player p
    INNER JOIN PlayerIds pid ON p.player_api_id = pid.player_api_id
    WHERE p.height IS NOT NULL
    
    RETURN ISNULL(@averageHeight, 0)
END

DECLARE @StartDate datetime
DECLARE @EndDate datetime

SET @StartDate = '2010-02-21 23:00:00'
SET @EndDate = '2010-02-22 22:59:59'

SELECT *
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE date BETWEEN @StartDate AND @EndDate

with vt as (
    select *, 
           row_number() over (partition by CustomerID order by StartDate) as seqnum
    from transactions_1k
),
cte as (
    -- Base case: first transaction for each customer
    select TransactionID, CustomerID, StartDate, EndDate, StartDate as reference_date, 0 as flag, seqnum
    from vt
    where seqnum = 1
    
    union all
    
    -- Recursive case: process subsequent transactions
    select vt.TransactionID, vt.CustomerID, vt.StartDate, vt.EndDate,
           -- If current transaction is within 90 days of reference, keep same reference
           -- Otherwise, use current transaction as new reference
           case when vt.StartDate <= dateadd(day, 90, cte.reference_date) 
                then cte.reference_date 
                else vt.StartDate 
           end as reference_date,
           -- Flag = 1 if within 90 days of reference, 0 otherwise
           case when vt.StartDate <= dateadd(day, 90, cte.reference_date) 
                then 1 
                else 0 
           end as flag,
           vt.seqnum
    from cte 
    join vt on vt.seqnum = cte.seqnum + 1 and vt.CustomerID = cte.CustomerID
)
select TransactionID, CustomerID, StartDate, EndDate, flag
from cte
order by CustomerID, StartDate

DECLARE
    @ID int,
    @Date date

-- Create the destination table if it doesn't exist
IF OBJECT_ID('destinationTable', 'U') IS NULL
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE destinationTable (
        testRow nvarchar(MAX)
    )
END

DECLARE db_update_cursor CURSOR FOR
    SELECT TOP 2 ID, Date
    FROM Laboratory 
    ORDER BY ID, Date

OPEN db_update_cursor
FETCH NEXT FROM db_update_cursor INTO @ID, @Date

WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
    -- Insert the values as a JSON string
    INSERT INTO destinationTable(testRow)
    VALUES ((SELECT @ID AS ID, @Date AS Date FOR JSON AUTO, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER))
    
    FETCH NEXT FROM db_update_cursor INTO @ID, @Date
END

CLOSE db_update_cursor
DEALLOCATE db_update_cursor

WITH DistinctPayments AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT payments
    FROM loan
),
PaymentCount AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) as distinct_count
    FROM DistinctPayments
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN pc.distinct_count < 2 THEN NULL
        ELSE (
            SELECT payments 
            FROM (
                SELECT payments, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY payments DESC) as rn
                FROM DistinctPayments
            ) ranked
            WHERE rn = 2
        )
    END as second_highest_payment
FROM PaymentCount pc

target_account_id = (
    SELECT user_id_version_2 
    FROM user_id_mapping 
    WHERE user_id_version_1 = loan.target_account_id
)
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM user_id_mapping 
    WHERE user_id_version_1 = loan.source_account_id
)
AND EXISTS (

    FROM user_id_mapping 
    WHERE user_id_version_1 = loan.target_account_id
)

WITH bucketed_transactions AS (
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, [date]) / 5 * 5, 0) AS clamped_time,
        amount,
        balance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, [date]) / 5 * 5, 0) 
            ORDER BY [date]
        ) AS rn
    FROM trans
),
first_transactions AS (
    SELECT 
        clamped_time,
        amount AS open_value
    FROM bucketed_transactions
    WHERE rn = 1
),
bucket_aggregates AS (
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, [date]) / 5 * 5, 0) AS clamped_time,
        MIN(balance) AS low_value
    FROM trans
    GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, [date]) / 5 * 5, 0)
)
SELECT 
    ba.clamped_time,
    ft.open_value AS [Open],
    ba.low_value AS [Low]
FROM bucket_aggregates ba
JOIN first_transactions ft ON ba.clamped_time = ft.clamped_time
ORDER BY ba.clamped_time

WITH SplitPlayerIds AS (
    SELECT 
        pa.id,
        pa.player_api_id as original_player_api_id,
        LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) as individual_player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(CAST(pa.player_api_id AS NVARCHAR(MAX)), ',')
    WHERE pa.player_api_id IS NOT NULL 
        AND CAST(pa.player_api_id AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) LIKE '%,%'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        pa.id,
        pa.player_api_id as original_player_api_id,
        CAST(pa.player_api_id AS NVARCHAR(20)) as individual_player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    WHERE pa.player_api_id IS NOT NULL 
        AND CAST(pa.player_api_id AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) NOT LIKE '%,%'
)
SELECT TOP 10
    spi.id,
    p.player_name,
    spi.individual_player_api_id as player_api_id
FROM SplitPlayerIds spi
LEFT JOIN Player p ON TRY_CAST(spi.individual_player_api_id AS INT) = p.player_api_id
WHERE spi.individual_player_api_id IS NOT NULL 
    AND TRY_CAST(spi.individual_player_api_id AS INT) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY spi.id

WITH CardCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        name,
        COUNT(printings) AS Prints,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(printings) DESC) as rn
    FROM cards
    GROUP BY name
),
TopCards AS (
    SELECT 
        name,
        Prints,
        rn
    FROM CardCounts
    WHERE rn <= 3
),
OthersSum AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(Prints) AS Prints
    FROM CardCounts
    WHERE rn > 3
)
SELECT name, Prints
FROM TopCards
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Others' AS name, Prints
FROM OthersSum
WHERE Prints IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    CASE WHEN name = 'Others' THEN 4 ELSE 1 END,
    Prints DESC

SELECT 
    a1.atom_id,
    a1.element,
    c.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    a2.atom_id AS connected_atom_id,
    a2.element AS connected_element
FROM atom a1
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a1.molecule_id = 'TR000'
ORDER BY a1.atom_id, a2.atom_id

WITH hero_activity AS
  (SELECT id,
          activity_date,
          activity_value,
          hero_id
   FROM (
         VALUES (1,
                 '2023-01-01',
                 10,
                 1), (2,
                      '2023-01-02',
                      20,
                      1), (3,
                           '2023-02-01',
                           15,
                           1), (4,
                                '2023-02-02',
                                25,
                                1), (5,
                                     '2023-01-03',
                                     30,
                                     2), (6,
                                          '2023-02-03',
                                          40,
                                          2)) AS t (id, activity_date, activity_value, hero_id)),
     monthly_totals AS
  (SELECT *,
          DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(activity_date), MONTH(activity_date), 1) AS month_start
   FROM hero_activity),
     aggregated_data AS
  (SELECT DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(activity_date), MONTH(activity_date), 1) AS month_start,
          SUM(activity_value) AS month_total
   FROM hero_activity
   GROUP BY DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(activity_date), MONTH(activity_date), 1)),
     lagged_monthly_totals AS
  (SELECT month_start,
          month_total,
          LAG(month_total) OVER (
                                 ORDER BY month_start) AS prev_month_total
   FROM aggregated_data),
     activity_with_metrics AS
  (SELECT ha.*,
          SUM(ha.activity_value) OVER (
                                       ORDER BY ha.activity_date, ha.id) AS run_tot,
                                   SUM(ha.activity_value) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(ha.activity_date), MONTH(ha.activity_date)
                                                                ORDER BY ha.activity_date, ha.id) AS m_run_tot
   FROM hero_activity ha)
SELECT awm.id,
       awm.activity_date,
       awm.activity_value,
       awm.run_tot,
       awm.m_run_tot,
       ISNULL(lmt.prev_month_total, 0) AS required_output
FROM activity_with_metrics awm
LEFT JOIN lagged_monthly_totals lmt ON DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(awm.activity_date), MONTH(awm.activity_date), 1) = lmt.month_start
ORDER BY awm.activity_date, awm.id

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT
        r.raceId,
        r.name AS raceName,
        r.year,
        c.name AS circuitName,
        d.forename + ' ' + d.surname AS driverName,
        res.driverId,
        res.constructorId,
        res.position AS finishPosition,
        res.points,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY r.year ORDER BY res.points DESC) AS seasonRanking,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.raceId, res.constructorId ORDER BY res.points DESC) AS constructorDriverRank
    FROM races AS r
    INNER JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
    INNER JOIN results AS res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
    INNER JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE res.position IS NOT NULL
),
ConstructorPerformance AS (
    SELECT
        constructorId,
        AVG(CAST(points AS FLOAT)) AS avgPoints,
        COUNT(*) AS raceCount
    FROM results
    GROUP BY constructorId
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
)

SELECT
    rr.raceId,
    rr.raceName,
    rr.circuitName,
    rr.driverName,
    co.name AS constructorName,
    rr.finishPosition,
    rr.points,
    rr.seasonRanking,
    cp.avgPoints AS constructorAvgPoints,
    CASE
        WHEN rr.constructorDriverRank = 1 THEN 'Primary'
        ELSE 'Secondary'
    END AS driverStatus
FROM RaceResults AS rr
INNER JOIN constructors AS co ON rr.constructorId = co.constructorId
LEFT JOIN ConstructorPerformance AS cp ON cp.constructorId = rr.constructorId
WHERE rr.constructorDriverRank <= 2
ORDER BY
    rr.raceId,
    rr.finishPosition

WITH GOT_Filled AS (
    SELECT 
        ID,
        DATE,
        GOT,
        MAX(CASE WHEN GOT IS NOT NULL THEN DATE END) 
            OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY DATE 
                  ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS Last_NonNull_Date
    FROM Laboratory
)
SELECT 
    g.ID,
    g.DATE,
    g.GOT,
    COALESCE(g.GOT, 
             (SELECT l.GOT 
              FROM Laboratory l 
              WHERE l.ID = g.ID 
                AND l.DATE = g.Last_NonNull_Date)) AS NEW_GOT
FROM GOT_Filled g
ORDER BY g.ID, g.DATE

WITH PatientExamData AS (
    SELECT
        P.ID AS PATIENTID,
        P.SEX,
        P.BIRTHDAY,
        E.[Examination Date],
        E.DIAGNOSIS,
        E.THROMBOSIS,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY P.ID ORDER BY E.[Examination Date]) AS ExamRank
    FROM PATIENT AS P
    LEFT JOIN EXAMINATION AS E ON P.ID = E.ID
),
LatestLabResults AS (
    SELECT
        L.ID,
        L.PLT,
        L.WBC,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY L.ID ORDER BY L.[Date] DESC) AS LabRank
    FROM Laboratory AS L
    WHERE L.[Date] <= GETDATE()
),
PatientRiskProfile AS (
    SELECT
        PED.PATIENTID,
        PED.SEX,
        PED.BIRTHDAY,
        PED.[Examination Date],
        PED.DIAGNOSIS,
        PED.THROMBOSIS,
        CASE
            WHEN LLR.PLT < 150 OR LLR.WBC > 11 THEN 'High'
            WHEN PED.THROMBOSIS IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
            ELSE 'Normal'
        END AS RiskCategory
    FROM PatientExamData PED
    LEFT JOIN LatestLabResults LLR ON PED.PATIENTID = LLR.ID AND LLR.LabRank = 1
)

SELECT
    PATIENTID,
    SEX,
    BIRTHDAY,
    COUNT([Examination Date]) AS EXAMINATIONCOUNT,
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS THROMBOSISCOUNT,
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NOTHROMBOSISCOUNT,
    MAX(CASE WHEN RiskCategory = 'High' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HighRiskFlag
FROM PatientRiskProfile
WHERE RiskCategory != 'Unknown' 
   OR (THROMBOSIS IS NOT NULL AND THROMBOSIS IN (0, 1))
   OR THROMBOSIS IS NULL
GROUP BY
    PATIENTID,
    SEX,
    BIRTHDAY
HAVING COUNT([Examination Date]) > 0
ORDER BY
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC,
    PATIENTID

WITH data AS (
    SELECT
        county,
        cdscode,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY county ORDER BY cdscode ASC) AS rnk
    FROM schools
)
SELECT
    a.cdscode AS cdscode1,
    a.county AS county1,
    b.cdscode AS cdscode2,
    b.county AS county2
FROM data AS a
INNER JOIN data AS b ON
    a.county = b.county AND
    b.rnk = a.rnk + 1
WHERE a.rnk % 2 = 1
ORDER BY a.county, a.rnk

SELECT
    a1.molecule_id,
    a1.atom_id AS atom1_id,
    a1.element AS atom1_element,
    a2.atom_id AS atom2_id,
    a2.element AS atom2_element,
    c.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM atom AS a1
INNER JOIN connected AS c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN atom AS a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE
    a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    AND a1.atom_id < a2.atom_id
ORDER BY
    a1.molecule_id,
    a1.atom_id,
    a2.atom_id

SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label AS molecule_label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element AS atom_element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM molecule AS m
INNER JOIN atom AS a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    a.atom_id,
    b.bond_id

SELECT *
FROM molecule
WHERE molecule_id NOT IN ('TR000', 'TR001', 'TR002')
  AND molecule_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    FORMAT([date], 'yyyy-MM') AS month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT [date]) AS distinct_days
FROM rulings
WHERE [date] IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY FORMAT([date], 'yyyy-MM')
ORDER BY month

SELECT
    s.superhero_name,
    COALESCE(g.gender, 'N/A') AS gender
FROM superhero s
LEFT JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
ORDER BY s.id

DECLARE @DiagnosisSearch NVARCHAR(100) = 'SLE';

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p 
CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(p.Diagnosis, ',') s
WHERE TRIM(s.VALUE) = @DiagnosisSearch
   OR p.Diagnosis LIKE '%' + @DiagnosisSearch + '%'

UNION

SELECT DISTINCT e.ID
FROM Examination e
CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(e.Diagnosis, ',') s
WHERE TRIM(s.VALUE) = @DiagnosisSearch
   OR e.Diagnosis LIKE '%' + @DiagnosisSearch + '%'

WITH PatientExamHistory AS (
    SELECT
        p.ID,
        p.SEX,
        p.Birthday,
        p.Description,
        p.[First Date],
        p.Admission,
        p.Diagnosis AS PatientDiagnosis,
        e.[Examination Date],
        e.[aCL IgG],
        e.[aCL IgM],
        e.ANA,
        e.[ANA Pattern],
        e.[aCL IgA],
        e.Diagnosis AS ExamDiagnosis,
        e.KCT,
        e.RVVT,
        e.LAC,
        e.Symptoms,
        e.Thrombosis,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.ID ORDER BY e.[Examination Date] DESC) AS ExamRank,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY p.ID) AS ExamCount
    FROM Patient AS p
    LEFT JOIN Examination AS e ON e.ID = p.ID
    LEFT JOIN Laboratory AS l ON l.ID = p.ID AND l.Date = e.[Examination Date]
    WHERE p.SEX = 'F' OR (e.Thrombosis = 1 AND e.Thrombosis IS NOT NULL)
),
LatestLabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        l.Date,
        l.WBC,
        l.RBC,
        l.HGB,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.ID ORDER BY l.Date DESC) AS LabRank
    FROM Laboratory AS l
)
SELECT
    peh.*,
    llr.WBC,
    llr.RBC,
    llr.HGB,
    CASE
        WHEN peh.ExamCount > 1 THEN 'Multiple Exams'
        WHEN peh.ExamCount = 1 THEN 'Single Exam'
        ELSE 'No Exams'
    END AS ExamStatus
FROM PatientExamHistory peh
LEFT JOIN LatestLabResults llr ON llr.ID = peh.ID AND llr.LabRank = 1
WHERE peh.ExamRank = 1 OR peh.ExamRank IS NULL
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN peh.Thrombosis = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    peh.ID

WITH LabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        l.Date,
        l.GOT, l.GPT, l.LDH, l.ALP, l.TP, l.ALB, l.UA, l.UN, l.CRE,
        l.[T-BIL], l.[T-CHO], l.TG, l.CPK, l.GLU, l.WBC, l.RBC, l.HGB,
        l.HCT, l.PLT, l.PT, l.APTT, l.FG, l.[U-PRO], l.IGG, l.IGA, l.IGM,
        l.CRP, l.RA, l.RF, l.C3, l.C4, l.RNP, l.SM, l.SC170, l.SSA, l.SSB,
        l.CENTROMEA, l.DNA, l.[DNA-II],
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.ID ORDER BY l.Date DESC) AS rn
    FROM Laboratory l
    INNER JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
    WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
)
SELECT
    l.ID,
    l.Date,
    l.GOT, l.GPT, l.LDH, l.ALP, l.TP, l.ALB, l.UA, l.UN, l.CRE,
    l.[T-BIL], l.[T-CHO], l.TG, l.CPK, l.GLU, l.WBC, l.RBC, l.HGB,
    l.HCT, l.PLT, l.PT, l.APTT, l.FG, l.[U-PRO], l.IGG, l.IGA, l.IGM,
    l.CRP, l.RA, l.RF, l.C3, l.C4, l.RNP, l.SM, l.SC170, l.SSA, l.SSB,
    l.CENTROMEA, l.DNA, l.[DNA-II]
FROM LabResults l
WHERE l.rn = 1
ORDER BY l.ID

WITH LabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        l.Date,
        l.GOT, l.GPT, l.LDH, l.ALP, l.TP, l.ALB, l.UA, l.UN, l.CRE,
        l.[T-BIL], l.[T-CHO], l.TG, l.CPK, l.GLU, l.WBC, l.RBC, l.HGB,
        l.HCT, l.PLT, l.PT, l.APTT, l.FG, l.[U-PRO], l.IGG, l.IGA, l.IGM,
        l.CRP, l.RA, l.RF, l.C3, l.C4, l.RNP, l.SM, l.SC170, l.SSA, l.SSB,
        l.CENTROMEA, l.DNA, l.[DNA-II],
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.ID ORDER BY l.Date DESC) AS rn
    FROM Laboratory l
    INNER JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
    WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
)
SELECT
    ID,
    Date,
    GOT, GPT, LDH, ALP, TP, ALB, UA, UN, CRE,
    [T-BIL], [T-CHO], TG, CPK, GLU, WBC, RBC, HGB,
    HCT, PLT, PT, APTT, FG, [U-PRO], IGG, IGA, IGM,
    CRP, RA, RF, C3, C4, RNP, SM, SC170, SSA, SSB,
    CENTROMEA, DNA, [DNA-II]
FROM LabResults
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY ID

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT
        r.raceId,
        r.year,
        r.date,
        res.driverId,
        res.points,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY res.driverId, r.year ORDER BY r.date) AS SeasonRaceNumber,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY res.driverId ORDER BY r.year, r.date) AS CareerRaceNumber
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE res.position IS NOT NULL
),
DriverFirstFiveRaces AS (
    SELECT
        driverId,
        year,
        raceId,
        points,
        CareerRaceNumber
    FROM RaceResults
    WHERE CareerRaceNumber <= 5
)
SELECT
    d.driverId,
    d.forename + ' ' + d.surname AS DriverName,
    MAX(CASE WHEN dff.CareerRaceNumber = 1 THEN dff.points END) AS Race1_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN dff.CareerRaceNumber = 2 THEN dff.points END) AS Race2_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN dff.CareerRaceNumber = 3 THEN dff.points END) AS Race3_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN dff.CareerRaceNumber = 4 THEN dff.points END) AS Race4_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN dff.CareerRaceNumber = 5 THEN dff.points END) AS Race5_Points
FROM DriverFirstFiveRaces dff
JOIN drivers d ON dff.driverId = d.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY d.surname, d.forename

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT
        r.raceId,
        r.year,
        r.name AS raceName,
        res.positionText,
        d.forename + ' ' + d.surname AS driverName,
        res.driverId
    FROM results res
    INNER JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    INNER JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE ISNUMERIC(res.positionText) = 1 AND CAST(res.positionText AS INT) <= 3
)
SELECT
    rr.raceId,
    MAX(rr.year) AS year,
    MAX(rr.raceName) AS raceName,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '1' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position1_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '1' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '2' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position2_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '2' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '3' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position3_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '3' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position3
FROM RaceResults rr
GROUP BY rr.raceId
ORDER BY MAX(rr.year) DESC, rr.raceId

WITH x AS
  (SELECT driverid,
          statusid,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY driverid
                             ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn
   FROM results
   GROUP BY driverid,
            statusid)
INSERT INTO results (resultId, raceId, driverId, constructorId, number, grid, position, positionText, positionOrder, points, laps, time, milliseconds, fastestLap, rank, fastestLapTime, fastestLapSpeed, statusId)
SELECT 
    (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(resultId), 0) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY driverid) FROM results) AS resultId,
    1 AS raceId,
    driverid,
    1 AS constructorId,
    1 AS number,
    1 AS grid,
    1 AS position,
    '1' AS positionText,
    1 AS positionOrder,
    0.0 AS points,
    1 AS laps,
    '00:00:00' AS time,
    0 AS milliseconds,
    1 AS fastestLap,
    1 AS rank,
    '00:00:00' AS fastestLapTime,
    '000.000' AS fastestLapSpeed,
    statusid
FROM x
WHERE rn = 1

WITH DriverGroups AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN nationality IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
            ELSE nationality
        END AS driver_group,
        code
    FROM drivers
    WHERE code IS NOT NULL
),
GroupedCodes AS (
    SELECT
        driver_group,
        MIN(CAST(code AS NVARCHAR(255))) AS min_code,
        MAX(CAST(code AS NVARCHAR(255))) AS max_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count
    FROM DriverGroups
    GROUP BY driver_group
)
SELECT
    driver_group,
    CASE
        WHEN distinct_code_count > 1 THEN
            min_code + '-' + max_code
        ELSE
            max_code
    END AS concat_codes
FROM GroupedCodes
ORDER BY driver_group

WITH DriverGroups AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(nationality, 'Unknown') AS driver_group,
        code
    FROM drivers
    WHERE code IS NOT NULL
),
GroupedCodes AS (
    SELECT
        driver_group,
        MIN(code) AS min_code,
        MAX(code) AS max_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count
    FROM DriverGroups
    GROUP BY driver_group
)
SELECT
    driver_group,
    CASE
        WHEN distinct_code_count > 1 THEN min_code + '-' + max_code
        ELSE max_code
    END AS concat_codes
FROM GroupedCodes
ORDER BY driver_group

WITH TeamAverages AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(CAST(BUILDUPPLAYSPEED AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgBuildupplaySpeed,
        AVG(CAST(DEFENCETEAMWIDTH AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgDefenceTeamWidth
    FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES
    WHERE BUILDUPPLAYSPEED IS NOT NULL
    AND DEFENCETEAMWIDTH IS NOT NULL
),
LatestTeamRecords AS (
    SELECT
        TA.*,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id ORDER BY TA.date DESC) AS LatestRecord
    FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES AS TA
    WHERE TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED IS NOT NULL 
    AND TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    LTR.ID,
    LTR.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
    LTR.BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
    LTR.CHANCECREATIONPASSING,
    LTR.CHANCECREATIONCROSSING,
    LTR.CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
    LTR.DEFENCEPRESSURE,
    LTR.DEFENCEAGGRESSION,
    LTR.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH
FROM LatestTeamRecords AS LTR
CROSS JOIN TeamAverages AS TA
WHERE LTR.LatestRecord = 1
AND CAST(LTR.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > TA.AvgBuildupplaySpeed
AND CAST(LTR.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH AS DECIMAL(10,2)) < TA.AvgDefenceTeamWidth
ORDER BY LTR.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED DESC, LTR.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH ASC

WITH TeamAttributeEvolution AS (
    SELECT
        ID,
        TEAM_API_ID,
        DATE,
        BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
        BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
        CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
        DEFENCETEAMWIDTH,
        LEAD(BUILDUPPLAYSPEED) OVER (PARTITION BY TEAM_API_ID ORDER BY DATE) AS NextBuildupPlaySpeed,
        LEAD(BUILDUPPLAYPASSING) OVER (PARTITION BY TEAM_API_ID ORDER BY DATE) AS NextBuildupPlayPassing,
        LAG(DEFENCETEAMWIDTH) OVER (PARTITION BY TEAM_API_ID ORDER BY DATE) AS PrevDefenceTeamWidth,
        LAG(CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING) OVER (PARTITION BY TEAM_API_ID ORDER BY DATE) AS PrevChanceCreationShooting,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TEAM_API_ID) AS TeamRecordCount
    FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES
    WHERE BUILDUPPLAYSPEED IS NOT NULL 
        AND DEFENCETEAMWIDTH IS NOT NULL
        AND CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING IS NOT NULL
        AND BUILDUPPLAYPASSING IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    ID,
    TEAM_API_ID,
    DATE,
    BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
    BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
    CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
    DEFENCETEAMWIDTH,
    NextBuildupPlaySpeed,
    NextBuildupPlayPassing,
    PrevDefenceTeamWidth,
    PrevChanceCreationShooting,
    TeamRecordCount
FROM TeamAttributeEvolution
WHERE TeamRecordCount > 1
    AND PrevDefenceTeamWidth > BUILDUPPLAYSPEED
ORDER BY TEAM_API_ID, DATE

WITH PatientTestDates AS (
    SELECT
        p.ID,
        p.SEX,
        p.Diagnosis,
        l.Date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.ID ORDER BY l.Date) AS RowNum
    FROM Patient p
    LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.Date >= p.[First Date] OR p.[First Date] IS NULL
),
ExaminationDates AS (
    SELECT
        p.ID,
        MIN(e.[Examination Date]) AS earliest_exam_date
    FROM Patient p
    LEFT JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
    GROUP BY p.ID
)
SELECT
    ptd.ID,
    ptd.SEX,
    ptd.Diagnosis,
    CASE
        WHEN ptd.Date < ed.earliest_exam_date OR ed.earliest_exam_date IS NULL
        THEN ptd.Date
        ELSE ed.earliest_exam_date
    END AS earliest_test_date
FROM PatientTestDates ptd
LEFT JOIN ExaminationDates ed ON ptd.ID = ed.ID
WHERE ptd.RowNum = 1

WITH cte AS
  (SELECT [ID],
          [Examination Date],
          [Thrombosis],
          risklag = LAG([Thrombosis], 1, [Thrombosis]) OVER (PARTITION BY [ID]
                                                             ORDER BY [Examination Date]), 
          rn = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [ID],
                                              YEAR([Examination Date]),
                                              MONTH([Examination Date])
                                 ORDER BY [Examination Date] DESC)
   FROM [Examination])
SELECT [ID],
       startofmonth = CONVERT(DATE, DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, [Examination Date]), 0)),
       increase_risk = CASE
                           WHEN risklag < [Thrombosis] THEN 'Yes'
                           ELSE 'No'
                       END,
       decrease_risk = CASE
                           WHEN risklag > [Thrombosis] THEN 'Yes'
                           ELSE 'No'
                       END
FROM cte
WHERE rn = 1
  AND risklag = 0

SELECT 
    FLOOR(COALESCE(LEN(label), 0) / 100) * 100 AS labellengthstart,
    FLOOR(COALESCE(LEN(label), 0) / 100) * 100 + 99 AS labellengthend,
    COUNT(*) AS moleculecount
FROM [molecule]
GROUP BY FLOOR(COALESCE(LEN(label), 0) / 100)
ORDER BY labellengthstart

WITH t AS
  (SELECT e.*,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.id
                             ORDER BY e.[Examination Date]) AS seqnum
   FROM examination AS e),
     cte AS
  (SELECT t.id,
          t.[Examination Date] AS startdate,
          t.seqnum,
          'N' AS isrehire,
          t.[Examination Date] AS anchordate
   FROM t
   WHERE t.seqnum = 1
   UNION ALL SELECT t.id,
                    t.[Examination Date] AS startdate,
                    t.seqnum,
                    CASE
                        WHEN t.[Examination Date] > DATEADD(YEAR, 1, cte.anchordate) THEN 'Y'
                        ELSE 'N'
                    END AS isrehire,
                    CASE
                        WHEN t.[Examination Date] > DATEADD(YEAR, 1, cte.anchordate) THEN t.[Examination Date]
                        ELSE cte.anchordate
                    END AS anchordate
   FROM cte
   INNER JOIN t ON cte.id = t.id AND t.seqnum = cte.seqnum + 1)
SELECT id,
       startdate,
       seqnum,
       isrehire
FROM cte
ORDER BY id,
         seqnum

WITH MoleculeList AS (
    SELECT value AS molecule_id
    FROM STRING_SPLIT('TR000,TR001,TR002', ',')
),
MoleculeStats AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        COUNT(a.atom_id) AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_type) AS unique_bond_types,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(a.atom_id) DESC) AS size_rank
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    LEFT JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
)
SELECT
    ml.molecule_id,
    ms.label,
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.unique_bond_types,
    CASE
        WHEN ms.size_rank = 1 THEN 'Largest'
        WHEN ms.size_rank <= 3 THEN 'Top 3'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS size_category
FROM MoleculeList ml
LEFT JOIN MoleculeStats ms ON ml.molecule_id = ms.molecule_id
WHERE ms.atom_count > (SELECT AVG(atom_count) FROM MoleculeStats)
   OR ms.molecule_id IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT('TR000,TR001', ','))

SELECT *
FROM
(
    SELECT
        id,
        name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY label) AS item,
        CONCAT(label, ' (', tag1, ')') AS value
    FROM
    (
        SELECT
            id,
            name,
            'Colors' AS label,
            colors   AS tag1
        FROM cards
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            id,
            name,
            'ManaCost' AS label,
            manaCost   AS tag1
        FROM cards
    ) AS src
) AS src
PIVOT
(
    MAX(value)
    FOR item IN ([1], [2])
) AS pvt
WHERE id = 1

WITH T_period_futur AS
  (SELECT 1 AS Tpf_period_id,
          CAST('2021-10-25' AS DATE) AS Tpf_start_period
   UNION ALL SELECT Tpf_period_id + 1 AS Tpf_period_id,
                    DATEADD(WEEK, 1, Tpf_start_period)
   FROM T_period_futur
   WHERE Tpf_period_id < 12 )
SELECT Tpf_period_id,
       Tpf_start_period,
       YEAR(Tpf_start_period) AS Tpf_year,
       CAST(YEAR(Tpf_start_period) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '.' + 
       RIGHT('0' + CAST(DATEPART(WEEK, Tpf_start_period) AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) AS Tpf_period_number,
       DATEADD(DAY, 6, Tpf_start_period) AS Tpf_end_period
FROM T_period_futur

WITH PatientThrombosisHistory AS (
    SELECT
        e.ID,
        e.Thrombosis,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.ID ORDER BY e.[Examination Date] DESC) AS RecencyRank,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY e.ID) AS ExamCount
    FROM Examination e
    WHERE e.Thrombosis IS NOT NULL
),
LabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        AVG(l.PLT) AS AvgPlateletCount,
        MAX(CASE WHEN l.PLT < 150 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HasLowPlatelets
    FROM Laboratory l
    WHERE l.Date >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE())
    GROUP BY l.ID
)
SELECT
    p.ID AS PatientID,
    p.Diagnosis,
    CASE
        WHEN lr.HasLowPlatelets = 1 AND pth.Thrombosis IS NULL THEN 1
        WHEN pth.ExamCount > 1 THEN
            (SELECT TOP 1 Thrombosis
             FROM Examination
             WHERE ID = p.ID
             ORDER BY [Examination Date] DESC)
        ELSE COALESCE(pth.Thrombosis, 0)
    END AS ThrombosisStatus,
    lr.AvgPlateletCount
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN PatientThrombosisHistory pth ON p.ID = pth.ID AND pth.RecencyRank = 1
LEFT JOIN LabResults lr ON p.ID = lr.ID
ORDER BY p.ID

WITH TEAMATTRS AS
  (SELECT BUILDUPPLAYSPEED AS VALUE,
          'Team_Attributes' AS IDENTIFIER,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                             ORDER BY BUILDUPPLAYSPEED) AS RN
   FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES)
SELECT PLAYERATTRS.VALUE AS PLAYER_VALUE,
       PLAYERATTRS.IDENTIFIER AS PLAYER_IDENTIFIER,
       TEAMATTRS.VALUE AS TEAM_VALUE,
       TEAMATTRS.IDENTIFIER AS TEAM_IDENTIFIER
FROM
  (SELECT OVERALL_RATING AS VALUE,
          'Player_Attributes' AS IDENTIFIER,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                             ORDER BY OVERALL_RATING) AS RN
   FROM PLAYER_ATTRIBUTES) AS PLAYERATTRS
FULL OUTER JOIN TEAMATTRS ON PLAYERATTRS.RN = TEAMATTRS.RN

WITH data1 AS (
    SELECT
        originalreleasedate,
        -- Calculate Monday as start of week
        DATEADD(DAY, 
            -(DATEPART(WEEKDAY, CAST(originalreleasedate AS DATE)) + 5) % 7, 
            CAST(originalreleasedate AS DATE)
        ) AS start_of_week
    FROM cards
    WHERE originalreleasedate IS NOT NULL
      AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, originalreleasedate) IS NOT NULL
      AND originalreleasedate >= '2007-01-01'
)
SELECT
    start_of_week,
    DATEDIFF(WEEK, '2007-01-01', start_of_week) + 1 AS week_number,
    COUNT(*) AS card_count
FROM data1
GROUP BY start_of_week
ORDER BY start_of_week

SELECT [date],
       home_team_api_id AS group_1,
       away_team_api_id AS group_2,
       home_team_goal AS daily_goals,
       SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY DATEPART(YEAR, [date]), 
                                              DATEPART(MONTH, [date]),
                                              home_team_api_id,
                                              away_team_api_id
                                 ORDER BY [date] ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS mtd,
       SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY DATEPART(YEAR, [date]),
                                              DATEPART(QUARTER, [date]),
                                              home_team_api_id,
                                              away_team_api_id
                                 ORDER BY [date] ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS qtd,
       SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY DATEPART(YEAR, [date]),
                                              home_team_api_id,
                                              away_team_api_id
                                 ORDER BY [date] ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS ytd,
       SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_api_id,
                                              away_team_api_id
                                 ORDER BY [date] ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS ltd
FROM [Match]
ORDER BY [date],
         home_team_api_id,
         away_team_api_id

SELECT
    c.name AS card_name,
    l.format,
    MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Legal' THEN l.id END) AS legal_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Banned' THEN l.id END) AS banned_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Legal' THEN l.id END) - 
    MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Banned' THEN l.id END) AS id_diff
FROM cards AS c
INNER JOIN legalities AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE l.format IN ('commander', 'duel', 'legacy')
    AND l.status IN ('Legal', 'Banned')
GROUP BY c.name, l.format
HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Legal' THEN l.id END) IS NOT NULL
    OR MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Banned' THEN l.id END) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.name ASC, l.format ASC

WITH lab_sequences AS
  (SELECT id,
          date AS current_date,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id
                             ORDER BY date) AS row_num,
          LAG(date) OVER (PARTITION BY id
                          ORDER BY date) AS prev_date
   FROM laboratory)
SELECT id AS usercode,
       prev_date AS previous_lab_date,
       current_date AS current_lab_date,
       row_num AS sequence_number
FROM lab_sequences
WHERE prev_date IS NOT NULL
  AND id = 27654
ORDER BY current_date

SELECT raceId,
       name,
       [date],
       [year],
       LAG(raceId) OVER (PARTITION BY [year]
                         ORDER BY [date]) AS prevRaceId,
       LEAD(raceId) OVER (PARTITION BY [year]
                          ORDER BY [date]) AS nextRaceId
FROM races
ORDER BY [year],
         [date]

WITH pages AS
  (SELECT 1 AS page_id,
          1 AS power_id
   UNION ALL SELECT 1,
                    7
   UNION ALL SELECT 2,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 3,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 3,
                    7
   UNION ALL SELECT 3,
                    89
   UNION ALL SELECT 4,
                    20
   UNION ALL SELECT 5,
                    55
   UNION ALL SELECT 5,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 6,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 6,
                    13),
     items AS
  (SELECT 10 AS hero_id,
          1 AS power_id
   UNION ALL SELECT 10,
                    7
   UNION ALL SELECT 10,
                    20
   UNION ALL SELECT 12,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 12,
                    55),
     page_power_counts AS
  (SELECT page_id,
          COUNT(DISTINCT power_id) AS total_powers
   FROM pages
   GROUP BY page_id)
SELECT ppc.page_id,
       i.hero_id
FROM page_power_counts ppc
INNER JOIN pages p ON ppc.page_id = p.page_id
INNER JOIN items i ON p.power_id = i.power_id
GROUP BY ppc.page_id,
         i.hero_id,
         ppc.total_powers
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.power_id) = ppc.total_powers

WITH patient_diagnoses AS
  (SELECT p.id,
          e.[Examination Date] AS exam_date,
          e.diagnosis AS current_diagnosis,
          LAG(e.diagnosis) OVER (PARTITION BY p.id
                                 ORDER BY e.[Examination Date]) AS prev_diagnosis,
          CASE
              WHEN e.diagnosis IN ('RA susp.', 'PSS', 'SLE') THEN 1
              ELSE 0
          END AS output_flag
   FROM Patient AS p
   JOIN Examination AS e ON p.id = e.id
   WHERE e.diagnosis IS NOT NULL)
SELECT id,
       MIN(exam_date) AS first_diagnosis_date
FROM patient_diagnoses
WHERE (current_diagnosis <> prev_diagnosis OR prev_diagnosis IS NULL)
  AND current_diagnosis IN ('RA susp.', 'PSS', 'SLE')
GROUP BY id
ORDER BY id

WITH KEYWORDMATCHES AS
  (SELECT 
      P.ID,
      P.player_name,
      CASE WHEN PATINDEX('%' + LOWER('Aaron') + '%', LOWER(P.player_name)) > 0 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END AS COLASCORE,
      CASE WHEN PATINDEX('%' + LOWER('Cresswell') + '%', LOWER(P.player_name)) > 0 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END AS COLBSCORE,
      CASE WHEN PATINDEX('%' + LOWER('Doran') + '%', LOWER(P.player_name)) > 0 THEN 0.1 ELSE 0 END AS COLCSCORE
   FROM Player AS P),
KEYWORDSCORES AS
  (SELECT 
      ID,
      player_name,
      COLASCORE,
      COLBSCORE,
      COLCSCORE,
      (COLASCORE + COLBSCORE + COLCSCORE) AS TOTAL_SCORE
   FROM KEYWORDMATCHES)
SELECT 
    ID,
    player_name AS DESCRIPTION,
    TOTAL_SCORE AS SCORE
FROM KEYWORDSCORES
WHERE TOTAL_SCORE > 0
ORDER BY TOTAL_SCORE DESC

WITH ATOMRNS AS
  (SELECT MOLECULE_ID,
          ELEMENT,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY MOLECULE_ID
                             ORDER BY ATOM_ID) AS RN
   FROM ATOM)
SELECT MOLECULE_ID,
       MAX(CASE
               WHEN RN = 1 THEN ELEMENT
           END) AS ELEMENT1,
       MAX(CASE
               WHEN RN = 2 THEN ELEMENT
           END) AS ELEMENT2,
       MAX(CASE
               WHEN RN = 3 THEN ELEMENT
           END) AS ELEMENT3
FROM ATOMRNS
GROUP BY MOLECULE_ID

WITH SUPERHEROLIST AS (
    SELECT
        ID,
        SUPERHERO_NAME,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY ID
        ) AS GLOBAL_RANK
    FROM SUPERHERO
)
SELECT
    S1.SUPERHERO_NAME AS CURRENTSUPERHERO,
    S2.SUPERHERO_NAME AS SUPERHEROAFTER4
FROM SUPERHEROLIST AS S1
LEFT JOIN SUPERHEROLIST AS S2
    ON S2.GLOBAL_RANK = S1.GLOBAL_RANK + 4
ORDER BY S1.GLOBAL_RANK

SELECT num
FROM
  (SELECT number AS num,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) - 
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CAST(number AS INT)) AS grp
   FROM cards
   WHERE ISNUMERIC(number) = 1 AND number IS NOT NULL) AS a
GROUP BY grp, num
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY num

WITH MoleculeBondCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT bond_type) AS distinct_bond_count
    FROM bond
    GROUP BY molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT bond_type) > 1
),
FirstBondTypes AS (
    SELECT 
        b.molecule_id,
        MIN(b.bond_type) AS first_bond_type
    FROM bond b
    INNER JOIN MoleculeBondCounts mbc ON b.molecule_id = mbc.molecule_id
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
)
SELECT 
    molecule_id,
    first_bond_type AS bond_type
FROM FirstBondTypes
ORDER BY molecule_id

SELECT "type", MAX("event_date") AS latest_event_date
FROM "event"
WHERE "event_date" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "type"

select "element", "record"
from "frpm_record"
union all
select 
    substr("element", 1, instr("element", '_') - 1) || '_rate' as element,
    max(case when "element" like '%_highgrade' then "record" end) /
    max(case when "element" like '%_lowgrade' then "record" end) as "record"
from "frpm_record"
group by substr("element", 1, instr("element", '_') - 1)

SELECT M."id", M."date", M."overall_rating"
FROM "Player_Rate" M
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT "id", MAX("date") AS max_date
    FROM "Player_Rate"
    GROUP BY "id"
) latest ON M."id" = latest."id" AND M."date" = latest.max_date

MERGE INTO "frpm" target 
USING (SELECT DISTINCT "CDSCode" FROM "frpm" WHERE "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" >= 0.5) source 
ON (target."CDSCode" = source."CDSCode") 
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1000
SELECT "id", "date", "home_team_goal", LAG("home_team_goal") OVER (ORDER BY "date" ASC) AS prev_home_goal FROM "Match" WHERE "date" <= '2024-02-26'

MERGE INTO "school_record" tab2
USING (
    SELECT "CDSCode" FROM "charter_school" WHERE "Charter School (Y/N)" = '1'
) tab1
ON (tab1."CDSCode" = tab2."CDSCode")
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT ("CDSCode") VALUES (tab1."CDSCode")

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN LENGTH("first_name") <= 2 THEN "first_name"
        ELSE SUBSTR("first_name", 1, 1) || RPAD('', LENGTH("first_name") - 2, '•') || SUBSTR("first_name", LENGTH("first_name"), 1)
    END AS masked_first_name,
    CASE 
        WHEN LENGTH("last_name") <= 2 THEN "last_name"
        ELSE SUBSTR("last_name", 1, 1) || RPAD('', LENGTH("last_name") - 2, '•') || SUBSTR("last_name", LENGTH("last_name"), 1)
    END AS masked_last_name
FROM "member"

SELECT 
    "atom_id",
    MAX(CASE WHEN "rn" = 1 THEN "bond_id" END) AS "bond_id_1",
    MAX(CASE WHEN "rn" = 2 THEN "bond_id" END) AS "bond_id_2",
    MAX(CASE WHEN "rn" = 3 THEN "bond_id" END) AS "bond_id_3"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        "atom_id",
        "bond_id",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "atom_id" ORDER BY "bond_id") AS "rn"
    FROM "connected"
) 
WHERE "rn" <= 3
GROUP BY "atom_id"
ORDER BY "atom_id"

WITH tokenized_members AS (
    SELECT
        a."link_to_event",
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."link_to_member", '[^|]+', 1, LEVEL) AS member_token,
        LEVEL AS position
    FROM "attendance_trunc" a
    CONNECT BY 
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."link_to_member", '[^|]+', 1, LEVEL) IS NOT NULL
        AND PRIOR a."link_to_event" = a."link_to_event"
        AND PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL
),
member_names AS (
    SELECT
        tm."link_to_event",
        tm.position,
        COALESCE(m."member_name", 'Unknown Member') AS member_name
    FROM tokenized_members tm
    LEFT JOIN "member_trunc" m ON tm.member_token = m."member_id"
)
SELECT
    mn."link_to_event",
    LISTAGG(mn.member_name, '|') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mn.position) AS "link_to_member"
FROM member_names mn
GROUP BY mn."link_to_event"
ORDER BY mn."link_to_event"

delete from "atom"
where "molecule_id" in (
    select "molecule"."molecule_id"
    from "molecule"
    where DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("molecule"."label", 4000, 1) = '-'
)
and DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("atom"."element", 4000, 1) <> 'cl'

SELECT "cds", 
       "sname",
       JSON_ARRAYAGG(
           JSON_OBJECT(
               'enroll12' VALUE "enroll12",
               'NumTstTakr' VALUE "NumTstTakr",
               'AvgScrRead' VALUE "AvgScrRead",
               'AvgScrMath' VALUE "AvgScrMath",
               'AvgScrWrite' VALUE "AvgScrWrite"
           )
           ORDER BY "enroll12" DESC
           RETURNING CLOB
       ) AS "SATSummary"
FROM "satscores"
WHERE "rtype" = 'S'
GROUP BY "cds", "sname"

WITH OrderedCategories AS (
    SELECT
        SUM("spent") AS category_total,
        "category" AS category
    FROM "budget"
    GROUP BY "category"
    ORDER BY "category" DESC
),
Cumulative AS (
    SELECT category_total, category,
           SUM(category_total) OVER (ORDER BY category DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_sum
    FROM OrderedCategories
)
SELECT category_total, category
FROM Cumulative
WHERE cumulative_sum <= 850

SELECT header || ': ' || name AS grouped_countries
FROM (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN name LIKE 'Country Group%' THEN name END)
        OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS header,
        id,
        name
    FROM "Country"
)
WHERE name NOT LIKE 'Country Group%'
  AND header IS NOT NULL

SELECT
    TO_CHAR("type") AS event_type,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "event_date") = year_range.recent_year THEN 1 END) -
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "event_date") = year_range.oldest_year THEN 1 END) AS year_difference
FROM "event",
    (
        SELECT
            MAX(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "event_date")) AS recent_year,
            MIN(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "event_date")) AS oldest_year
        FROM "event"
    ) year_range
GROUP BY TO_CHAR("type"), year_range.recent_year, year_range.oldest_year

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT 
    CASE 
        WHEN m1."home_team_api_id" < m1."away_team_api_id" 
        THEN m1."home_team_api_id" || '-' || m1."away_team_api_id"
        ELSE m1."away_team_api_id" || '-' || m1."home_team_api_id"
    END
) AS unique_reciprocal_pairs
FROM "Match" m1
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "Match" m2
    WHERE m2."home_team_api_id" = m1."away_team_api_id"
    AND m2."away_team_api_id" = m1."home_team_api_id"
)

SELECT player_id,
       overall_rating,
       potential,
       preferred_foot,
       attacking_work_rate
FROM (SELECT player_api_id AS player_id, 
             overall_rating, 
             potential, 
             preferred_foot, 
             attacking_work_rate, 
             row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY player_api_id ORDER BY date DESC) as rn 
      FROM Player_Attributes 
      WHERE date <= '2015-12-31') subquery
WHERE rn = 1

SELECT 
    DistrictName,
    CASE 
        WHEN CHARINDEX('Unified', DistrictName) > 0 THEN CHARINDEX('Unified', DistrictName)
        ELSE 0
    END AS Position
FROM frpm
WHERE DistrictName IS NOT NULL

SELECT * FROM atom_view
WHERE atom_id IN ('TR000_1', 'TR000_2')

SELECT frpm.*
FROM frpm
LEFT OUTER JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
LEFT OUTER JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE (satscores.cds = '01100170112607' OR schools.CDSCode = '01100170112607')
AND frpm.Charter = 1
AND COALESCE(frpm."District Code", 0) = 10017

SELECT 
    "player_fifa_api_id" as id,
    MAX("date") + 1 AS start_date,
    DATE '2025-12-31' AS end_date
FROM "Player_Attributes"
WHERE "date" >= DATE '2000-01-01' AND "date" <= DATE '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY "player_fifa_api_id"
HAVING MAX("date") < DATE '2025-12-31'

SELECT * FROM "event"
WHERE "status" != 'Closed'
ORDER BY "event_date"
OFFSET 10 ROWS FETCH NEXT 5 ROWS ONLY
FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED

SELECT e."event_id", b."amount", a."link_to_member", a."link_to_event"
FROM "event" e
JOIN "budget" b ON e."event_id" = b."link_to_event"
LEFT JOIN "attendance" a ON e."event_id" = a."link_to_event"
ORDER BY e."event_id"

SELECT sh."id" AS superhero_id,
       sh."superhero_name",
       a."alignment" AS moral_alignment
FROM "superhero" AS sh
JOIN "alignment" AS a ON sh."alignment_id" = a."id"
WHERE a."alignment" LIKE '%Good%'

WITH weekly_data AS (
    SELECT 
        TRUNC(eventdate, 'IW') AS eventdate,
        userid,
        traffic,
        location
    FROM SCHOOL_EVENTS
),
weekly_traffic AS (
    SELECT 
        eventdate,
        userid,
        SUM(traffic) AS traffic
    FROM weekly_data
    GROUP BY eventdate, userid
),
location_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        eventdate,
        userid,
        location,
        COUNT(*) AS location_freq
    FROM weekly_data
    GROUP BY eventdate, userid, location
),
most_frequent_location AS (
    SELECT 
        eventdate,
        userid,
        location,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY eventdate, userid ORDER BY location_freq DESC) AS rn
    FROM location_counts
)
SELECT 
    wt.eventdate,
    wt.userid,
    wt.traffic,
    mfl.location
FROM weekly_traffic wt
JOIN most_frequent_location mfl ON wt.eventdate = mfl.eventdate AND wt.userid = mfl.userid
WHERE mfl.rn = 1
ORDER BY wt.eventdate, wt.userid

merge into record r
using (
    select rowid as rid, sys_guid() as uuid
    from record
) src on (r.rowid = src.rid)
when matched then update set 
    r1 = src.uuid,
    r2 = src.uuid

INSERT INTO groups (room_guid, user_guid)
SELECT l.guid, g.user_guid
FROM login l
JOIN (
    SELECT login, name, guid, 
           FIRST_VALUE(guid) OVER (PARTITION BY login, name ORDER BY guid) as first_guid
    FROM login
    WHERE (login, name) IN (
        SELECT login, name 
        FROM login 
        GROUP BY login, name 
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    )
) dup ON l.login = dup.login AND l.name = dup.name
JOIN groups g ON g.room_guid = dup.first_guid
WHERE l.guid NOT IN (SELECT room_guid FROM groups)

WITH years AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bl."TRANSACT_DT_TM") AS year_val
    FROM "BOND_LIST" bl
    WHERE bl."TRANSACT_DT_TM" IS NOT NULL
),
bond_types AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT br."BOND_TYPE"
    FROM "BOND_REF" br
),
year_bond_combinations AS (
    SELECT 
        y.year_val,
        bt."BOND_TYPE"
    FROM years y
    CROSS JOIN bond_types bt
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bl."TRANSACT_DT_TM") AS year_val,
        bl."BOND_TYPE",
        COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM "BOND_LIST" bl
    WHERE bl."TRANSACT_DT_TM" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bl."TRANSACT_DT_TM"), bl."BOND_TYPE"
)
SELECT 
    ybc.year_val AS "year",
    ybc."BOND_TYPE",
    COALESCE(bc.bond_count, 0) AS bond_count
FROM year_bond_combinations ybc
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc ON ybc.year_val = bc.year_val AND ybc."BOND_TYPE" = bc."BOND_TYPE"
ORDER BY ybc.year_val, ybc."BOND_TYPE"

SELECT id, enroll_date, total_employees
FROM (
    SELECT id, enroll_date, total_employees,
           id - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS grp
    FROM employee
    WHERE total_employees > 100
)
WHERE grp IN (
    SELECT grp
    FROM (
        SELECT id - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS grp
        FROM employee
        WHERE total_employees > 100
    )
    GROUP BY grp
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
ORDER BY id

select 
    sum("2020") as sum_2020, 
    sum("2021") as sum_2021, 
    sum("2022") as sum_2022, 
    sum("2023") as sum_2023, 
    sum("2024") as sum_2024,
    sum("2020" + "2021" + "2022" + "2023" + "2024") as sum_last_5_years,
    sum(for_total) as grand_total
from (
    select 
        extract(year from payment_date) as "year", 
        payment_sum as for_total
    from FEE
    where extract(year from payment_date) between 2020 and 2024
) 
pivot (
    sum(for_total) 
    for "year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024)
)

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(RAWTOHEX(STANDARD_HASH(product_id, 'SHA1')), 1, 16) AS hash_value,
    8 AS hash_length
FROM products

DECLARE 
    v_match_id NUMBER;
    v_match_date DATE;
    v_home_team_goals NUMBER;
    v_away_team_goals NUMBER;
    v_home_team_name NCLOB;
    v_away_team_name NCLOB;
    v_league_name NVARCHAR2(512);
BEGIN
    SELECT "Match"."id",
           "Match"."date",
           "Match"."home_team_goal",
           "Match"."away_team_goal",
           "HomeTeam"."team_long_name",
           "AwayTeam"."team_long_name",
           "League"."name"
    INTO v_match_id,
         v_match_date,
         v_home_team_goals,
         v_away_team_goals,
         v_home_team_name,
         v_away_team_name,
         v_league_name
    FROM "Match"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "HomeTeam" ON "Match"."home_team_api_id" = "HomeTeam"."team_api_id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "AwayTeam" ON "Match"."away_team_api_id" = "AwayTeam"."team_api_id"
    INNER JOIN "League" ON "Match"."league_id" = "League"."id"
    WHERE ROWNUM = 1
    ORDER BY "Match"."date";
    
    -- Process the single row here
    
END

WITH "atom_hierarchy" AS
  (SELECT "atom_id",
          "atom_id2",
          "bond_id",
          1 AS "level",
          CAST("atom_id" || ',' || "atom_id2" AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS "path"
   FROM "connected"
   WHERE "atom_id" = 'TR007_8'
   UNION ALL 
   SELECT c."atom_id",
          c."atom_id2",
          c."bond_id",
          ah."level" + 1,
          ah."path" || ',' || c."atom_id2"
   FROM "connected" c
   JOIN "atom_hierarchy" ah ON c."atom_id" = ah."atom_id2"
   WHERE ah."level" < 10
   AND INSTR(ah."path", c."atom_id2") = 0)
SELECT "atom_id",
       "atom_id2",
       "bond_id",
       "level"
FROM "atom_hierarchy"
ORDER BY "level",
         "atom_id"

SELECT XMLSERIALIZE(DOCUMENT XMLELEMENT("files", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("file", XMLFOREST("id" AS "id", "team_long_name" AS "team_long_name"))
                                                        ORDER BY NLSSORT("team_long_name", 'NLS_SORT=XFRENCH'))) INDENT SIZE = 2)
FROM "Team" t
JOIN "Team_Attributes" ta ON t."team_api_id" = ta."team_api_id"
WHERE ta."date" IS NULL

WITH match_years AS (
    SELECT
        M."league_id",
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M."date") AS match_year,
        COUNT(*) AS year_count
    FROM "Match" M
    WHERE M."date" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY M."league_id", EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M."date")
),
league_stats AS (
    SELECT
        L."id" AS league_id,
        L."name" AS league_name,
        C."name" AS country_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT M."id") AS total_matches
    FROM "League" L
    JOIN "Country" C ON L."country_id" = C."id"
    LEFT JOIN "Match" M ON L."id" = M."league_id"
    GROUP BY L."id", L."name", C."name"
)
SELECT
    ls.league_name,
    my.match_year AS "year",
    my.year_count AS "match_count",
    ROUND(my.year_count / NULLIF(ls.total_matches, 0) * 100, 2) AS percentage_of_total
FROM match_years my
