JOIN league_stats ls ON my."league_id" = ls.league_id
WHERE my.match_year BETWEEN 2008 AND 2016
ORDER BY
    my.match_year,
    ls.league_name

WITH temp AS
  (SELECT a."atom_id",
          a."molecule_id",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a."molecule_id"
                             ORDER BY a."atom_id") - TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."atom_id", '\d+$')) AS grp
   FROM "atom" a), temp2 AS
  (SELECT t."atom_id",
          t."molecule_id",
          COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY t."molecule_id", t.grp) AS cnt
   FROM temp t)
SELECT t2."atom_id",
       t2."molecule_id"
FROM temp2 t2
WHERE t2.cnt >= 3
ORDER BY t2."molecule_id",
         t2."atom_id"

SELECT 
    school_id,
    first_start_date,
    final_end_date
FROM (
    SELECT 
        school_id,
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT start_date AS first_start_date,
        end_date AS final_end_date,
        CONNECT_BY_ISLEAF AS is_leaf,
        LEVEL AS hierarchy_level
    FROM school_info
    START WITH NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM school_info si2 
        WHERE si2.school_id = school_info.school_id 
        AND si2.end_date >= school_info.start_date - 1
        AND si2.start_date < school_info.start_date
    )
    CONNECT BY 
        school_id = PRIOR school_id
        AND start_date <= PRIOR end_date + 1
    ORDER SIBLINGS BY start_date
)
WHERE is_leaf = 1

WITH "MaxHeightCTE" AS (
    SELECT
        "alignment_id",
        "publisher_id",
        MAX("height_cm") AS "max_height"
    FROM "superhero"
    GROUP BY "alignment_id", "publisher_id"
),
"JoinedCTE" AS (
    SELECT
        s."id",
        s."superhero_name",
        s."alignment_id",
        s."publisher_id",
        s."height_cm",
        s."hair_colour_id"
    FROM "superhero" s
    JOIN "MaxHeightCTE" m
       ON s."alignment_id" = m."alignment_id"
      AND s."publisher_id" = m."publisher_id"
      AND s."height_cm"    = m."max_height"
),
"SummedCTE" AS (
    SELECT
        "alignment_id",
        "publisher_id",
        SUM("hair_colour_id") AS "total_hair_colour"
    FROM "JoinedCTE"
    GROUP BY "alignment_id", "publisher_id"
)
SELECT
    j."id",
    j."superhero_name",
    j."alignment_id",
    j."publisher_id",
    j."height_cm",
    j."hair_colour_id",
    s."total_hair_colour"
FROM "JoinedCTE" j
JOIN "SummedCTE" s
   ON j."alignment_id" = s."alignment_id"
  AND j."publisher_id" = s."publisher_id"
ORDER BY
    j."alignment_id",
    j."publisher_id",
    j."id"

WITH path_steps AS (
    SELECT
        from_atom,
        to_atom,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT(from_atom) AS path_root,
        LEVEL AS path_level,
        SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(from_atom, '->') AS path_trace
    FROM toxic_mappings
    CONNECT BY NOCYCLE from_atom = PRIOR to_atom
),
complete_paths AS (
    SELECT
        path_root AS begin_atom,
        to_atom AS end_atom,
        MIN(start_date) AS path_start_date,
        MAX(end_date) AS path_end_date
    FROM path_steps
    GROUP BY path_root, to_atom
)
SELECT
    begin_atom,
    end_atom,
    path_start_date,
    path_end_date
FROM complete_paths
ORDER BY begin_atom, path_start_date

WITH atom_bonds AS (
    SELECT
        a."atom_id",
        a."molecule_id",
        a."element",
        LISTAGG(c."bond_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c."bond_id") AS connected_bonds
    FROM "atom" a
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    GROUP BY a."atom_id", a."molecule_id", a."element"
),
molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        m."label"
    FROM "molecule" m
)
SELECT
    ab."atom_id",
    ab."molecule_id",
    ab."element",
    ms."label",
    SUBSTR(ab.connected_bonds, 1, INSTR(ab.connected_bonds || ',', ',') - 1) AS bond_id,
    b."bond_type"
FROM atom_bonds ab
JOIN molecule_stats ms ON ab."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON
    SUBSTR(ab.connected_bonds, 1, INSTR(ab.connected_bonds || ',', ',') - 1) = b."bond_id"
WHERE ab."atom_id" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ab."molecule_id", ab."atom_id"

WITH

set_a (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
        SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT element)
        FROM atom
        GROUP BY molecule_id
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT element) > 1
    ),
    set_b (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
        SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.element)
        FROM molecule m
        JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        WHERE m.label IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY m.molecule_id
    ),

unique_a (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
        FROM set_a
    ),
    unique_b (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
        FROM set_b
    ),

molecule_hierarchy AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            CONNECT_BY_ROOT molecule_id AS root_molecule,
            LEVEL AS hierarchy_level
        FROM molecule
        CONNECT BY NOCYCLE PRIOR molecule_id = molecule_id
        START WITH label = '+'
    )
SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.rn = b.rn AND a.density_rank = b.density_rank THEN 1 END) AS num_identical_in_a_and_b,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_a,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN b.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_b,
    LISTAGG(a.molecule_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.density_rank) AS matching_molecules,
    JSON_ARRAYAGG(
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'molecule' VALUE a.molecule_id,
            'rank' VALUE a.density_rank
        )
        ORDER BY b.density_rank
    ) AS molecule_json
FROM unique_a a
FULL OUTER JOIN unique_b b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND a.rn = b.rn
LEFT JOIN molecule_hierarchy h ON a.molecule_id = h.molecule_id
WHERE
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bond WHERE bond.molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND bond.bond_id = 'TR011_2_24')
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM connected c
        JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
        JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
        WHERE a1.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        AND a1.element = a2.element
    )
GROUP BY
    GROUPING SETS (
        (a.density_rank, b.density_rank),
        ()
    )
HAVING
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.molecule_id) > (
        SELECT AVG(element_count)
        FROM set_a
    )

SELECT "molecule_id",
       LISTAGG("element", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "element") AS "elements"
FROM "atom"
GROUP BY "molecule_id"

SELECT "molecule_id",
       LISTAGG("atom_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "atom_id") AS "atom_ids"
FROM "atom"
WHERE "molecule_id" = 'TR011'
GROUP BY "molecule_id"

WITH "data" ("value") AS
  (SELECT '111,2,3 | 112,4,5 | 113,6,7'
   FROM dual),
     "hero_attributes" ("value",
                        "i",
                        "max_i",
                        "hero_id",
                        "attribute_id",
                        "attribute_value") AS
  (SELECT "value",
          1,
          REGEXP_COUNT("value", '[^|]+'),
          TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,|]+),([^,|]+),([^,|]+)', 1, 1, NULL, 1)),
          TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,|]+),([^,|]+),([^,|]+)', 1, 1, NULL, 2)),
          TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,|]+),([^,|]+),([^,|]+)', 1, 1, NULL, 3))
   FROM "data"
   UNION ALL SELECT "value",
                    "i" + 1,
                    "max_i",
                    TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,|]+),([^,|]+),([^,|]+)', 1, "i" + 1, NULL, 1)),
                    TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,|]+),([^,|]+),([^,|]+)', 1, "i" + 1, NULL, 2)),
                    TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,|]+),([^,|]+),([^,|]+)', 1, "i" + 1, NULL, 3))
   FROM "hero_attributes"
   WHERE "i" < "max_i")
SELECT "i",
       "hero_id",
       "attribute_id",
       "attribute_value"
FROM "hero_attributes"
WHERE "hero_id" IS NOT NULL

WITH match_times AS (
    SELECT
        "date",
        "match_api_id",
        TRUNC("date") AS match_date,
        TO_CHAR("date", 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS match_date_str,
        EXTRACT(HOUR FROM "date") + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM "date")/60 AS hour_of_day
    FROM "Match"
    WHERE "date" IS NOT NULL
),
target_times AS (
    SELECT 8 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 20 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
),
distance_calc AS (
    SELECT
        mt."date",
        mt."match_api_id",
        mt.match_date_str,
        tt.target_hour,
        CASE
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 8 THEN 'morning'
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 20 THEN 'evening'
        END AS time_period,
        ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour) AS time_distance,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY mt.match_date_str, tt.target_hour
            ORDER BY ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour), mt."match_api_id"
        ) AS time_rank
    FROM match_times mt
    CROSS JOIN target_times tt
)
SELECT
    dc."date" AS target_datetime,
    dc."date",
    dc."match_api_id",
    dc.time_period,
    dc.time_distance,
    dc.hour_of_day AS actual_hours,
    dc.time_rank AS final_rank
FROM distance_calc dc
WHERE dc.time_rank = 1
  AND dc.time_distance <=
      CASE
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 8 THEN 4
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 20 THEN 3
      END
ORDER BY
    dc.match_date_str,
    dc.target_hour,
    dc.time_distance

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        COUNT(*) AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY atom_id) AS elements
    FROM atom
    GROUP BY molecule_id
)
SELECT 
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    c.atom_id2,
    stats.atom_count,
    stats.elements,
    CASE 
        WHEN stats.elements LIKE '%cl%' THEN 'Contains Chlorine'
        ELSE 'No Chlorine'
    END AS contains_cl
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
LEFT JOIN atom_stats stats ON m.molecule_id = stats.molecule_id
WHERE 
    (m.label IS NOT NULL OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM atom a2 
        WHERE a2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
        GROUP BY a2.molecule_id 
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
    ))
    AND c.atom_id2 IN (
        SELECT a3.atom_id 
        FROM atom a3 
        WHERE a3.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
        AND a3.element = CASE 
            WHEN a.element = 'cl' THEN 'cl'
            WHEN a.element = 'h' THEN 'o'
            WHEN a.element = 'o' THEN 'h'
            ELSE a.element
        END
    )
ORDER BY 
    m.molecule_id,
    a.atom_id,
    b.bond_id

WITH match_dates AS
  (SELECT "id",
          "date" AS match_date,
          TO_CHAR("date", 'fxDay', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=English') AS day_of_week,
          "date" AS match_start_time,
          "date" + INTERVAL '2' HOUR AS match_end_time
   FROM "Match")
SELECT m.*,
       ROUND(GREATEST(LEAST(m.match_end_time, TRUNC(m.match_date) + INTERVAL '17:00:00' HOUR TO SECOND) - GREATEST(m.match_start_time, TRUNC(m.match_date) + INTERVAL '07:30:00' HOUR TO SECOND), 0) * 24 * 60) AS match_duration_minutes
FROM match_dates m
WHERE TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(m.match_date, 'D')) BETWEEN 2 AND 6

WITH t AS
  (SELECT 1 AS from_hour, 4 AS to_hour, 20 AS pay FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS from_hour, 8 AS to_hour, 50 AS pay FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS from_hour, 12 AS to_hour, 100 AS pay FROM dual),
input_data AS
  (SELECT 6 AS user_hours FROM dual)
SELECT i.user_hours,
       (SELECT SUM(
          CASE 
            WHEN i.user_hours >= t.from_hour THEN
              (LEAST(i.user_hours, t.to_hour) - t.from_hour + 1) * t.pay
            ELSE 0
          END
        )
        FROM t
        WHERE i.user_hours >= t.from_hour) AS sum_to_pay
FROM input_data i

WITH molecule_atoms AS (
    SELECT m.molecule_id,
           a.atom_id,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS atom_rank
    FROM molecule m
    INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
)
SELECT ma.molecule_id,
       ma.atom_id AS first_atom_id
FROM molecule_atoms ma
WHERE ma.atom_rank = 1
ORDER BY ma.molecule_id

WITH molecule_hierarchy AS (
  SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    1 AS level,
    CAST(m."molecule_id" AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS path
  FROM "molecule" m
  JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
  WHERE a."element" = 'cl'
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    mh.level + 1,
    mh.path || '->' || m."molecule_id"
  FROM molecule_hierarchy mh
  JOIN "connected" c ON mh."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
  JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
  JOIN "atom" a ON c."atom_id2" = a."atom_id"
  JOIN "molecule" m ON a."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
  WHERE mh.level < 3
)

SELECT
  m."molecule_id",
  m."label",
  a."atom_id",
  a."element",
  c."atom_id2",
  b."bond_id",
  b."bond_type"
FROM "molecule" m
JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM molecule_hierarchy mh
  WHERE m."molecule_id" = mh."molecule_id"
)
ORDER BY
  m."molecule_id",
  a."atom_id",
  c."atom_id2"

WITH team_matches AS (
    -- Get all matches for home teams with win indicators
    SELECT 
        home_team_api_id AS team_api_id,
        date,
        CASE WHEN home_team_goal > away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_win
    FROM "Match"
    WHERE home_team_goal IS NOT NULL AND away_team_goal IS NOT NULL
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Get all matches for away teams with win indicators
    SELECT 
        away_team_api_id AS team_api_id,
        date,
        CASE WHEN away_team_goal > home_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_win
    FROM "Match"
    WHERE home_team_goal IS NOT NULL AND away_team_goal IS NOT NULL
),
ordered_matches AS (
    SELECT 
        team_api_id,
        date,
        is_win,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) - 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id, is_win ORDER BY date) AS grp
    FROM team_matches
)
SELECT 
    team_api_id,
    MIN(date) AS start_date,
    MAX(date) AS end_date,
    COUNT(*) AS match_count
FROM ordered_matches
WHERE is_win = 1
GROUP BY team_api_id, grp
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY team_api_id, start_date

SELECT 
    SUBSTR("date", 1, 4) || SUBSTR("date", 6) AS "updated_value"
FROM "Team_Attributes"
WHERE "date" LIKE '____.__.__'
SELECT * FROM molecule WHERE ROWNUM = 1

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT m."molecule_id",
           COUNT(a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
           MIN(a."element") AS first_element
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
)
SELECT m."molecule_id",
       ms.atom_count,
       CASE
           WHEN ms.atom_count > 0 THEN
               LISTAGG(a."atom_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id")
           ELSE 'No atoms'
       END AS "atom_ids",
       CASE
           WHEN ms.atom_count > 0 THEN
               JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                   JSON_OBJECT(
                       'atom_id' VALUE a."atom_id",
                       'element' VALUE a."element"
                   )
                   ORDER BY a."atom_id"
               )
           ELSE JSON_ARRAY('[]')
       END AS atom_json
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_stats ms ON m."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
WHERE (ms.first_element IS NULL OR ms.first_element != 'h')
GROUP BY m."molecule_id", ms.atom_count
ORDER BY ms.atom_count DESC NULLS LAST

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        COUNT(*) AS atom_count,
        MIN(element) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY atom_id) AS first_element,
        MAX(element) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY atom_id) AS last_element
    FROM "atom"
    GROUP BY molecule_id
),
ranked_atoms AS (
    SELECT
        a."atom_id",
        a."molecule_id",
        a."element",
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY a."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_rank,
        stats.atom_count,
        stats.first_element,
        stats.last_element
    FROM "atom" a
    JOIN atom_stats stats ON a."molecule_id" = stats.molecule_id
),
filtered_atoms AS (
    SELECT
        ra.*,
        CASE
            WHEN ra.atom_rank <= 2 THEN 'TOP'
            WHEN ra.atom_rank > ra.atom_count - 2 THEN 'BOTTOM'
            ELSE 'MIDDLE'
        END AS position,
        LAG(ra."element") OVER (PARTITION BY ra."molecule_id" ORDER BY ra."atom_id") AS prev_element,
        LEAD(ra."element") OVER (PARTITION BY ra."molecule_id" ORDER BY ra."atom_id") AS next_element
    FROM ranked_atoms ra
)
SELECT
    fa."atom_id",
    fa."molecule_id",
    fa."element",
    fa.atom_rank AS rnk,
    fa.position,
    fa.prev_element,
    fa.next_element,
    fa.first_element,
    fa.last_element
FROM filtered_atoms fa
WHERE fa.atom_rank <= 2
ORDER BY fa."molecule_id", fa.atom_rank

SELECT "id",
       REGEXP_SUBSTR("date", '[^ ]+', 1, COLUMN_VALUE) AS "date_part"
FROM "Team_Attributes",
     TABLE(CAST(MULTISET(SELECT LEVEL FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= REGEXP_COUNT("date", '[^ ]+')) AS SYS.ODCINUMBERLIST))

SELECT 
    "team_api_id" AS id,
    "date",
    "buildUpPlaySpeed" AS old_value,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS level,
    "next_buildUpPlaySpeed" AS new_value
FROM (
    SELECT 
        "team_api_id",
        "date",
        "buildUpPlaySpeed",
        LEAD("buildUpPlaySpeed") OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS "next_buildUpPlaySpeed"
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
) 
WHERE "buildUpPlaySpeed" != "next_buildUpPlaySpeed" 
   OR "next_buildUpPlaySpeed" IS NULL
ORDER BY "team_api_id", "date"

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE("CDSCode", '\.[^.]*$', '') AS "output"
FROM "schools"
WHERE "CDSCode" = '1110.400000.8001382'

WITH month_generator AS (
    SELECT
        ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('01/01/2018', 'MM/DD/YYYY'), level - 1) AS month_start_date,
        level AS month_num
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY level <= 12
),
all_molecules AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        m."label"
    FROM "molecule" m
)
SELECT
    mg.month_start_date,
    am."molecule_id",
    am."label",
    1 AS hierarchy_level,
    '/' || am."molecule_id" AS molecule_path
FROM month_generator mg
CROSS JOIN all_molecules am
ORDER BY
    mg.month_start_date,
    am."molecule_id"

WITH "my_table" AS
  (SELECT 'A' AS "cto",
          1 AS "nif",
          'A1' AS "file_",
          5 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A' AS "cto",
                    1 AS "nif",
                    'A2' AS "file_",
                    3 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A' AS "cto",
                    2 AS "nif",
                    'A3' AS "file_",
                    2 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A' AS "cto",
                    2 AS "nif",
                    'A4' AS "file_",
                    1 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'B' AS "cto",
                    1 AS "nif",
                    'B1' AS "file_",
                    4 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'B' AS "cto",
                    1 AS "nif",
                    'B2' AS "file_",
                    6 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual)
SELECT "cto",
       "nif",
       "file_",
       "partition",
       "mn" - "first_mn" + 1 AS "subpartition",
       "total_size"
FROM
  (SELECT t.*,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto"
                             ORDER BY SUBSTR("file_", 1, 1), TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR("file_", 2))) AS "rn"
   FROM "my_table" t) 
MATCH_RECOGNIZE(
  PARTITION BY "cto"
  ORDER BY "rn"
  MEASURES 
    MATCH_NUMBER() AS "partition",
    FIRST("rn") AS "first_mn",
    MATCH_NUMBER() AS "mn",
    SUM("filesize") AS "total_size"
  ALL ROWS PER MATCH
  PATTERN (same_nif+)
  DEFINE 
    same_nif AS (FIRST("nif") = "nif")
)

WITH molecule_dates AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "molecule_id",
    TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'MON-yy') AS activation_month,
    TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyymm') AS activation_ym
  FROM "molecule"
  WHERE "molecule_id" IS NOT NULL
),
months_range AS (
  SELECT 
    ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -12) + LEVEL - 1 AS month_date
  FROM dual
  CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12
),
month_grid AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TO_CHAR(m1.month_date, 'MON-yy') AS activation_month,
    TO_CHAR(m1.month_date, 'yyyymm') AS activation_rn,
    TO_CHAR(m2.month_date, 'MON-yy') AS act_month,
    TO_CHAR(m2.month_date, 'yyyymm') AS act_rn
  FROM months_range m1
  CROSS JOIN months_range m2
  WHERE m1.month_date <= m2.month_date
)
SELECT 
  g.activation_month,
  g.act_month,
  CASE 
    WHEN g.activation_rn = g.act_rn THEN
      (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT md."molecule_id")
       FROM molecule_dates md
       WHERE md.activation_ym = g.activation_rn)
    ELSE
      (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT md."molecule_id")
       FROM molecule_dates md
       WHERE md.activation_ym BETWEEN g.activation_rn AND g.act_rn)
  END AS active_molecules
FROM month_grid g
WHERE g.activation_rn >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'yyyymm')
ORDER BY g.activation_rn, g.act_rn

WITH "credits" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        12 AS "ARTCRED",
        7.5 AS "BIZCRED",
        12 AS "HUMCRED",
        14 AS "NATCRED",
        11 AS "TEKCRED",
        9 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        15 AS "ARTCRED",
        9 AS "BIZCRED",
        14 AS "HUMCRED",
        16 AS "NATCRED",
        13 AS "TEKCRED",
        11 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2020', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        10.5 AS "ARTCRED",
        6 AS "BIZCRED",
        5 AS "HUMCRED",
        4 AS "NATCRED",
        6 AS "TEKCRED",
        3 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"grp_choices" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('03.03.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'BIZ' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('05.05.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'NAT' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2022', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"effective_credits" AS (
    SELECT
        C."ID",
        C."ARTCRED",
        C."BIZCRED",
        C."HUMCRED",
        C."NATCRED",
        C."TEKCRED",
        C."GENCRED",
        C."EFFECTIVE_DATE",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY C."ID" ORDER BY C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" DESC) AS RN
    FROM "credits" C
)

SELECT
    G."ID",
    G."GROUPCHOICE",
    CASE
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'ART' THEN EC."ARTCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'BIZ' THEN EC."BIZCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'HUM' THEN EC."HUMCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'NAT' THEN EC."NATCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'TEK' THEN EC."TEKCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'GEN' THEN EC."GENCRED"
        ELSE 0
    END AS "TOTAL_CREDITS"
FROM "grp_choices" G
JOIN "effective_credits" EC ON G."ID" = EC."ID" AND EC.RN = 1
ORDER BY G."ID", G."GROUPCHOICE"

SELECT "molecule_id",
       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "molecule_id" ORDER BY "atom_id") AS atom_number
FROM "atom"

SELECT "team_api_id",
       "buildUpPlaySpeed",
       "date"
FROM
  (SELECT "team_api_id",
          "buildUpPlaySpeed",
          "date",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id"
                             ORDER BY TO_DATE("date", 'YYYY-MM-DD') DESC) AS seq
   FROM "Team_Attributes")
WHERE seq = 1

WITH latest_attributes AS (
    SELECT 
        player_api_id,
        overall_rating,
        preferred_foot,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_api_id ORDER BY date DESC) as rn
    FROM Player_Attributes
),
player_data AS (
    SELECT
        p.player_api_id AS player_id,
        p.player_name AS name,
        la.overall_rating AS rating,
        la.preferred_foot AS preferred_foot
    FROM Player p
    LEFT JOIN latest_attributes la ON p.player_api_id = la.player_api_id AND la.rn = 1
    WHERE p.player_api_id IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    player_id,
    name,
    TO_CHAR(rating) AS rating,
    preferred_foot
FROM player_data
WHERE name IS NOT NULL 
    AND rating IS NOT NULL 
    AND preferred_foot IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY rating DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

WITH match_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "m"."date" AS "match_date",
        "l"."name" AS "league_name",
        "c"."name" AS "country_name",
        "ht"."team_long_name" AS "home_team",
        "at"."team_long_name" AS "away_team",
        "m"."home_team_goal" AS "home_team_goals",
        "m"."away_team_goal" AS "away_team_goals",
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "m"."league_id", "m"."season"
                     ORDER BY "m"."home_team_goal" + "m"."away_team_goal" DESC) AS "high_scoring_rank"
    FROM "Match" "m"
    INNER JOIN "League" "l" ON "m"."league_id" = "l"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Country" "c" ON "m"."country_id" = "c"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "ht" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ht"."team_api_id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "at" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "at"."team_api_id"
),
team_performance AS (
    SELECT
        "team_long_name",
        COUNT(*) AS "total_matches",
        SUM(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "goals_scored",
        AVG(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "avg_goals_per_match"
    FROM (
        SELECT
            "match_date", "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals",
            "home_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            "match_date", "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals",
            "away_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
    )
    GROUP BY "team_long_name"
)
SELECT
    ms."match_date",
    ms."league_name",
    ms."country_name",
    ms."home_team",
    ms."away_team",
    ms."home_team_goals",
    ms."away_team_goals",
    ms."high_scoring_rank",
    htp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "home_team_avg_goals",
    atp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "away_team_avg_goals"
FROM match_stats ms
LEFT JOIN team_performance htp ON ms."home_team" = htp."team_long_name"
LEFT JOIN team_performance atp ON ms."away_team" = atp."team_long_name"
WHERE ms."high_scoring_rank" <= 10
ORDER BY ms."match_date" DESC

WITH "MY_TABLE" AS
  (SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
          'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '2222' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '2222' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '3333' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '3333' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    'DUMMY' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL),
     "MAP_RECRF_ASSET_TYPE" AS
  (SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
          'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
          1 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'NOTIONALDB' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    1 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWFWNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWFWNOTLDB' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    3 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL),
     "CTE" AS
  (SELECT X."TECHNICAL_ID",
          X."ASSET_TYPE",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY X."TECHNICAL_ID"
                             ORDER BY MRAT."PRIORITY") AS "rn"
   FROM "MY_TABLE" X
   INNER JOIN "MAP_RECRF_ASSET_TYPE" MRAT ON X."ASSET_TYPE" = MRAT."ASSET_TYPE"
   WHERE MRAT."APPLICATION" = 'SW')
SELECT "TECHNICAL_ID",
       "ASSET_TYPE"
FROM "CTE"
WHERE "rn" = 1

WITH match_dates AS (
    SELECT m."country_id",
           m."date",
           m."league_id",
           m."season",
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."country_id" ORDER BY m."date" DESC) AS match_rank
    FROM "Match" m
    WHERE m."date" IS NOT NULL
),
country_stats AS (
    SELECT c."id" AS country_id,
           c."name" AS country_name,
           COUNT(DISTINCT m."league_id") AS league_count,
           COUNT(DISTINCT m."season") AS season_count
    FROM "Country" c
    LEFT JOIN "Match" m ON c."id" = m."country_id"
    GROUP BY c."id", c."name"
),
match_summary AS (
    SELECT md."country_id",
           md."date",
           md.match_rank,
           l."name" AS league_name
    FROM match_dates md
    JOIN "League" l ON md."league_id" = l."id"
    WHERE md.match_rank <= 2
),
ranked_matches AS (
    SELECT ms."country_id",
           ms."date",
           ms.match_rank,
           LISTAGG(ms.league_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ms.league_name) AS leagues_played
    FROM match_summary ms
    GROUP BY ms."country_id", ms."date", ms.match_rank
)
SELECT cs.country_id,
       cs.country_name,
       MAX(CASE WHEN rm.match_rank = 1 THEN rm."date" END) AS last_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN rm.match_rank = 1 THEN rm.leagues_played END) AS last_match_leagues,
       MAX(CASE WHEN rm.match_rank = 2 THEN rm."date" END) AS prev_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN rm.match_rank = 2 THEN rm.leagues_played END) AS prev_match_leagues,
       cs.league_count,
       cs.season_count
FROM country_stats cs
LEFT JOIN ranked_matches rm ON cs.country_id = rm."country_id"
GROUP BY cs.country_id, cs.country_name, cs.league_count, cs.season_count
HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN rm.match_rank = 1 THEN rm."date" END) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY MAX(CASE WHEN rm.match_rank = 1 THEN rm."date" END) DESC

SELECT 
    a.atom_id,
    a.molecule_id,
    a.element,
    c.bond_id,
    COALESCE(b.bond_type, 'Unknown') AS bond_type
FROM "atom" a
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id 
    FROM "molecule" 
    WHERE label IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY a.atom_id

SELECT "m"."id",
       "m"."home_team_api_id",
       "m"."away_team_api_id",
       "m"."home_team_goal",
       "m"."away_team_goal",
       SUM(CASE
               WHEN "m"."home_team_api_id" = "teams"."team_api_id" THEN "m"."home_team_goal" - "m"."away_team_goal"
               ELSE "m"."away_team_goal" - "m"."home_team_goal"
           END) OVER (PARTITION BY "teams"."team_api_id"
                      ORDER BY "m"."id") AS "goal_difference"
FROM "Match" "m"
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT "team_api_id" FROM "Team"
) "teams"
WHERE ("m"."home_team_api_id" = "teams"."team_api_id" 
       OR "m"."away_team_api_id" = "teams"."team_api_id")
  AND "m"."date" = DATE '2008-11-22'
ORDER BY "teams"."team_api_id",
         "m"."id"

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        COUNT(a.atom_id) AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(a.element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS elements
    FROM atom a
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
),
bond_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        bond_id,
        molecule_id,
        bond_type,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 1) AS molecule_prefix,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) AS first_atom_num,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) AS second_atom_num
    FROM bond
    WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 2), '^\d+$') 
      AND REGEXP_LIKE(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 3), '^\d+$')
),
molecule_connectivity AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.atom_id) AS connected_atoms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.bond_id) AS bond_count,
        CASE
            WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Positive'
            WHEN m.label = '-' THEN 'Negative'
            ELSE 'Neutral'
        END AS charge_type
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    ast.atom_count,
    ast.elements,
    bh.first_atom_num + bh.second_atom_num AS atom_sum,
    mc.connected_atoms,
    mc.charge_type,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY b.bond_type) AS bond_type_rank
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
LEFT JOIN atom_stats ast ON m.molecule_id = ast.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_hierarchy bh ON b.bond_id = bh.bond_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_connectivity mc ON m.molecule_id = mc.molecule_id
WHERE a.element IN (SELECT DISTINCT element FROM atom WHERE molecule_id LIKE 'TR%')
  AND b.bond_type IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    atom_rank,
    bh.first_atom_num

SELECT T."team_long_name",
       T."team_short_name",
       TA."buildUpPlaySpeed",
       TA."buildUpPlaySpeedClass",
       TA."chanceCreationShooting",
       TA."chanceCreationShootingClass",
       TA."defencePressure",
       TA."defencePressureClass"
FROM "Team" T
INNER JOIN "Team_Attributes" TA ON T."team_api_id" = TA."team_api_id"
WHERE TA."date" = DATE '2013-09-20'

SELECT "valid_from",
       "valid_until",
       "count"
FROM
  (SELECT "dt" AS "valid_from",
          LEAD("dt") OVER (ORDER BY "dt") - INTERVAL '1' SECOND AS "valid_until",
          SUM("count_value") OVER (ORDER BY "dt") AS "count"
   FROM
     (SELECT "start_date" AS "dt",
             "count" AS "count_value"
      FROM
        (SELECT TO_DATE('2014-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "start_date", 1 AS "count"
         FROM "schools" WHERE ROWNUM = 1
         UNION ALL 
         SELECT TO_DATE('2014-02-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "start_date", 1 AS "count"
         FROM "schools" WHERE ROWNUM = 1)))
WHERE "count" > 0
  AND ("valid_from" <= "valid_until" OR "valid_until" IS NULL)

WITH school_data AS (
  SELECT
    s."CDSCode" AS "pk",
    CASE
      WHEN s."Charter" = 1 THEN 'Charter'
      WHEN s."Magnet" = 1 THEN 'Magnet'
      ELSE 'Regular'
    END AS "col2",
    SUBSTR(s."County", 1, INSTR(s."County", ' ') - 1) AS "col3"
  FROM "schools" s
  WHERE s."StatusType" = 'Active'
    AND s."LastUpdate" IS NOT NULL
    AND s."LastUpdate" >= TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:00', 'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi')
    AND s."LastUpdate" < TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:05', 'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi')
),
aggregated_data AS (
  SELECT
    sd."col2",
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT sd."col3", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sd."col3") AS "col3_list",
    COUNT(sd."pk") AS "record_count"
  FROM school_data sd
  GROUP BY sd."col2"
)
SELECT
  ad."col2",
  ad."col3_list" AS "col3",
  ad."record_count"
FROM aggregated_data ad
ORDER BY ad."record_count" DESC

SELECT "molecule"."molecule_id",
       "molecule"."label",
       "atom"."atom_id",
       "atom"."element",
       "bond"."bond_id",
       "bond"."bond_type",
       "connected"."atom_id2"
FROM "molecule"
INNER JOIN "atom" ON "molecule"."molecule_id" = "atom"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" ON "atom"."atom_id" = "connected"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" ON "connected"."bond_id" = "bond"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "molecule"."molecule_id",
         "atom"."atom_id",
         "connected"."atom_id2"

SELECT 
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    c.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    LISTAGG(c.atom_id2, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.atom_id2) AS connected_atoms
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE (m.label IS NULL OR m.label IN ('+', '-'))
GROUP BY 
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    c.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.atom_id2) > 0
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    a.atom_id,
    c.bond_id

SELECT m."molecule_id",
       CASE 
           WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE COUNT(a."atom_id") / COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id")
       END AS result
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
GROUP BY m."molecule_id"

WITH atom_counts AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS atom_count
    FROM atom a
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT
        b.molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM bond b
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id AS ID,
    COALESCE(ac.atom_count, 0) AS QTY,
    COALESCE(bc.bond_count, 0) AS VALUE
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom_counts ac ON m.molecule_id = ac.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc ON m.molecule_id = bc.molecule_id

SELECT
    COALESCE(a.atom_id, b.bond_id) AS "id",
    COALESCE(a.molecule_id, b.molecule_id) AS "molecule_id",
    COALESCE(a.element, b.bond_type) AS "val"
FROM atom a
FULL OUTER JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE COALESCE(a.atom_id, b.bond_id) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN a.atom_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 2
    END,
    "id"

WITH data AS
  (SELECT 101 AS id,
          'A' AS type,
          10 AS part
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS id,
                    'B' AS type,
                    10 AS part
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS id,
                    'B' AS type,
                    10 AS part
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS id,
                    'B' AS type,
                    20 AS part
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS id,
                    'C' AS type,
                    30 AS part
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 102 AS id,
                    'A' AS type,
                    10 AS part
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 102 AS id,
                    'B' AS type,
                    25 AS part
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 103 AS id,
                    'A' AS type,
                    25 AS part
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 103 AS id,
                    'B' AS type,
                    25 AS part
   FROM dual),
     w_cnt AS
  (SELECT id,
          part,
          COUNT(*) AS cnt
   FROM data
   GROUP BY id,
            part
   HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
SELECT d.id,
       d.type,
       d.part
FROM data d
INNER JOIN w_cnt w ON d.id = w.id
AND d.part = w.part
WHERE d.type = 'B'

WITH molecule_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        a.atom_id,
        a.element,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS atom_id2,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS bond_id,
        CAST(NULL AS NCLOB) AS bond_type,
        1 AS level,
        CAST(a.atom_id AS NVARCHAR2(4000)) AS path
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT
        h.molecule_id,
        h.label,
        h.atom_id,
        h.element,
        c.atom_id2,
        c.bond_id,
        b.bond_type,
        h.level + 1,
        h.path || '->' || c.atom_id2
    FROM molecule_hierarchy h
    JOIN connected c ON h.atom_id = c.atom_id
    LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE h.level < 3
    AND INSTR(h.path, c.atom_id2) = 0
),
pivoted_elements AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN element END) AS element1,
        MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN element END) AS element2,
        MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 3 THEN element END) AS element3
    FROM (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY atom_id) AS rn
        FROM atom
    )
    GROUP BY molecule_id
)

SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    pe.element1,
    pe.element2,
    pe.element3
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN pivoted_elements pe ON m.molecule_id = pe.molecule_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM molecule_hierarchy mh
    WHERE mh.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    AND mh.level > 1
)
ORDER BY m.molecule_id, a.atom_id

WITH "columns" ("column_name") AS
  (SELECT 'CDSCode'
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'StatusType'
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'School'
   FROM dual),
     "column_exists" ("column_name",
                      "column_exists") AS
  (SELECT c."column_name",
          NVL2(a."column_name", 'YES', 'NO')
   FROM "columns" c
   LEFT OUTER JOIN all_tab_columns a ON (a.table_name = 'SCHOOLS'
                                         AND c."column_name" = a."column_name"))
SELECT *
FROM "column_exists" PIVOT (MAX("column_exists")
                            FOR "column_name" IN ('CDSCode' AS "cdscode",
                                                  'StatusType' AS "statustype",
                                                  'School' AS "school"))
WHERE "cdscode" = 'YES'

WITH replacements ("molecule_id", "label", "spos") AS
  (SELECT "molecule_id",
          "label",
          REGEXP_INSTR("label", '\+', 1, 1, 1) - 1
   FROM "molecule"
   UNION ALL SELECT "molecule_id",
                    SUBSTR("label", 1, "spos" - 1) || '-' || SUBSTR("label", "spos" + 1),
                    REGEXP_INSTR(SUBSTR("label", 1, "spos" - 1) || '-' || SUBSTR("label", "spos" + 1), '\+', "spos" + 1, 1, 1) - 1
   FROM replacements
   WHERE "spos" > 0)
SELECT "molecule_id",
       "label"
FROM replacements
WHERE "spos" <= 0

WITH "a" ("test") AS
  (SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|Address at some where|details' FROM dual
   UNION ALL 
   SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009' FROM dual
   UNION ALL 
   SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16' FROM dual)
SELECT "test",
       REGEXP_SUBSTR("test", '^([^|]*\|){0,4}[^|]*') AS "res"
FROM "a"

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        m."label",
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id" AND b."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id", m."label"
),
atom_details AS (
    SELECT
        a."molecule_id",
        a."atom_id",
        a."element",
        LISTAGG(c."atom_id2", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c."atom_id2") AS connected_atoms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c."bond_id") AS bonds_per_atom
    FROM "atom" a
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    GROUP BY a."molecule_id", a."atom_id", a."element"
)
SELECT
    ms."molecule_id",
    ms."label",
    ad."atom_id",
    ad."element",
    c."bond_id",
    b."bond_type",
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.bond_count,
    ad.connected_atoms,
    ad.bonds_per_atom
FROM molecule_stats ms
JOIN atom_details ad ON ms."molecule_id" = ad."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON ad."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
WHERE ms.atom_count > 0
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN ms."label" = '+' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    ms."molecule_id",
    ad."atom_id",
    c."bond_id"

WITH molecule_pairs AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN INSTR(pair_str, ',') > 0
            THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(pair_str, 1, INSTR(pair_str, ',') - 1))
            ELSE pair_str
        END AS mol_id1,
        CASE
            WHEN INSTR(pair_str, ',') > 0
            THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(pair_str, INSTR(pair_str, ',') + 1))
            ELSE NULL
        END AS mol_id2
    FROM (
        SELECT 'TR427, TR430' AS pair_str FROM DUAL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'TR427, TR431' FROM DUAL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'TR430, TR431' FROM DUAL
    )
),
molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        m."label",
        COUNT(a."atom_id") OVER(PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") OVER(PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS bond_count,
        LISTAGG(a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY a."element")
            OVER(PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON m."molecule_id" = b."molecule_id"
)
SELECT
    m1."molecule_id" AS molecule_id1,
    m1."label" AS label1,
    m1.atom_count,
    m1.elements,
    m2."molecule_id" AS molecule_id2,
    m2."label" AS label2,
    m2.atom_count,
    m2.elements,
    CASE
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0 AND m2.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Both have bonds'
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Only ' || m1."molecule_id" || ' has bonds'
        WHEN m2.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Only ' || m2."molecule_id" || ' has bonds'
        ELSE 'Neither has bonds'
    END AS bond_status
FROM molecule_stats m1
JOIN molecule_pairs mp ON m1."molecule_id" = mp.mol_id1
JOIN molecule_stats m2 ON m2."molecule_id" = mp.mol_id2
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "connected" c1
    JOIN "connected" c2 ON c1."bond_id" = c2."bond_id"
    WHERE c1."atom_id" LIKE m1."molecule_id" || '\_%' ESCAPE '\'
    AND c2."atom_id" LIKE m2."molecule_id" || '\_%' ESCAPE '\'
    AND c1."atom_id" != c2."atom_id"
)
ORDER BY
    m1."molecule_id",
    m2."molecule_id"

SELECT m.molecule_id,
       m.label,
       a.atom_id,
       a.element,
       b.bond_id,
       b.bond_type,
       c.atom_id2
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
ORDER BY m.molecule_id,
         a.atom_id,
         b.bond_type

WITH string1_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('24,36,78,98', '[^,]+', 1, level) AS value,
           LEVEL AS position
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY level <= LENGTH('24,36,78,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('24,36,78,98', ',')) + 1
),
string2_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('25,36,88,98', '[^,]+', 1, level) AS value,
           LEVEL AS position
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY level <= LENGTH('25,36,88,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('25,36,88,98', ',')) + 1
),
string1_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string1_tab
),
string2_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string2_tab
),
common_values AS (
    SELECT s1.num_value
    FROM string1_parsed s1
    JOIN string2_parsed s2 ON s1.num_value = s2.num_value
)
SELECT LISTAGG(num_value, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY num_value) AS common_values
FROM common_values
WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL

WITH t AS
  (SELECT "date",
          "match_api_id" AS code,
          TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date") AS duration,
          COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id", TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) AS cnt,
          MIN(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id") AS min_dur
   FROM "Match")
SELECT t."date",
       t.code,
       t.duration,
       CASE
           WHEN t.min_dur = 0
                OR MAX(t.cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY t."date", t.code) > 1 THEN 'Y'
           ELSE 'N'
       END AS flg
FROM t
WHERE t."date" = TO_DATE('2008-11-22 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."element"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id"

SELECT b."bond_id",
       b."molecule_id",
       b."bond_type",
       GREATEST(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), m.months), SYSDATE) AS bond_formation_date
FROM "bond" b
CROSS JOIN
  (SELECT level AS months
   FROM dual CONNECT BY level <= 5) m
WHERE b."molecule_id" = 'TR011'

SELECT JSON_OBJECTAGG(
    KEY "country_id" VALUE 
    (SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'date' VALUE m."date",
            'home_team_goal' VALUE m."home_team_goal",
            'away_team_goal' VALUE m."away_team_goal"
        )
    )
    FROM "Match" m
    WHERE m."country_id" = c."country_id")
) AS JSON
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT "country_id" FROM "Match") c

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count,
        LISTAGG(DISTINCT a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."element") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
molecule_pivot AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            m."molecule_id",
            a."element",
            COUNT(*) AS element_count
        FROM "molecule" m
        JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
        GROUP BY m."molecule_id", a."element"
    )
    PIVOT (
        SUM(element_count)
        FOR element IN ('cl' AS chlorine, 'c' AS carbon, 'h' AS hydrogen, 'o' AS oxygen, 'n' AS nitrogen)
    )
)
SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    b."bond_id",
    b."bond_type",
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.bond_count,
    ms.elements,
    mp.chlorine,
    mp.carbon,
    mp.hydrogen,
    mp.oxygen,
    mp.nitrogen,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY b."bond_type") AS bond_type_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN a."element" = 'cl' THEN 'Chlorine'
        WHEN a."element" = 'c' THEN 'Carbon'
        WHEN a."element" = 'h' THEN 'Hydrogen'
        WHEN a."element" = 'o' THEN 'Oxygen'
        WHEN a."element" = 'n' THEN 'Nitrogen'
        ELSE a."element"
    END AS element_name
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_stats ms ON m."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_pivot mp ON m."molecule_id" = mp."molecule_id"
ORDER BY
    m."molecule_id",
    a."atom_id",
    b."bond_id"

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT m."molecule_id",
           COUNT(a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
           LISTAGG(a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
bond_stats AS (
    SELECT b."molecule_id",
           COUNT(b."bond_id") AS bond_count
    FROM "bond" b
    GROUP BY b."molecule_id"
)
SELECT ms."molecule_id",
       ms.atom_count AS "total_atoms",
       bs.bond_count,
       CASE
           WHEN ms.atom_count > 0 THEN
               ROUND(bs.bond_count / ms.atom_count, 2)
           ELSE 0
       END AS bonds_per_atom,
       ms.elements
FROM molecule_stats ms
LEFT JOIN bond_stats bs ON ms."molecule_id" = bs."molecule_id"
WHERE ms.elements LIKE '%cl%' AND ms.atom_count > 0
ORDER BY ms."molecule_id"

SELECT 
    "m"."id",
    "m"."date",
    "m"."home_team_api_id",
    "m"."away_team_api_id",
    "m"."home_team_goal",
    "m"."away_team_goal"
FROM "Match" "m"
INNER JOIN "Team_Attributes" "ta" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ta"."team_api_id"
WHERE "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeed" > (
    SELECT AVG("buildUpPlaySpeed") 
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
    WHERE "buildUpPlaySpeed" IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY "m"."home_team_goal" DESC

with lose_agg as
  (select "team_api_id",
          sum(case
                  when to_number(to_char("date", 'YYYY')) = 2011 then "defencePressure"
              end) as lose_5,
          sum(case
                  when to_number(to_char("date", 'YYYY')) = 2012 then "defencePressure"
              end) as lose_10
   from "Team_Attributes"
   where "date" is not null
   group by "team_api_id"),
     profit_agg as
  (select "team_api_id",
          sum(case
                  when to_number(to_char("date", 'YYYY')) = 2011 then "buildUpPlaySpeed"
              end) as profit_5,
          sum(case
                  when to_number(to_char("date", 'YYYY')) = 2012 then "buildUpPlaySpeed"
              end) as profit_10
   from "Team_Attributes"
   where "date" is not null
   group by "team_api_id")
select l.lose_5,
       p.profit_5,
       l.lose_10,
       p.profit_10,
       coalesce(p."team_api_id", l."team_api_id") as "team_api_id"
from lose_agg l
full outer join profit_agg p on l."team_api_id" = p."team_api_id"
order by coalesce(p."team_api_id", l."team_api_id")
